1000629798.english: I swallowed my tangled thoughts and moved forward.

1000629799.english: It's my role to pull the stunned squad members together, stabilize the situation, and show the way ahead.
1000629799.korean: - 넋이 나간 대원들을 추스르고, 상황을 수습하고, 앞길을 제시하는 게 내 역할이니까.

1000629800.english: Yaaawn... it’s been a while since we worked in our specialty field.

1000629801.english: Careful, your jaw’s gonna pop off from yawning. Did you stay up late again last night?
1000629801.korean: 하품하다 턱 빠지겠다. 어제 또 늦게 잤어?

1000629802.english: Heheh, I just couldn’t stop halfway through.

1000629803.english: Was it that Masked Warrior thing you were watching? What about Miho?
1000629803.korean: 그 가면용사인가 뭔가 본 거야? 미호는?

1000629804.english: Miho watched a little but said it was boring and went to sleep. Yaaawn...
1000629804.korean: 미호는 좀 보다가 재미없다고 자더라. 하암...

1000629805.english: What about Mom? She’s not here yet?

1000629806.english: She’s finalizing the operation plans with the City Guard. Miho and Draco went with her too.
1000629806.korean: 시티가드랑 작전 최종 조율중이셔. 미호랑 드라코도 같이 갔어.

1000629807.english: Ah, right. Miho said she found a really pretty nail polish and that she’d share it with you!
1000629807.korean: 아, 맞다. 미호가 매니큐어 예쁜거 찾았다고 너랑 같이 쓴다던데?

1000629809.english: That’s probably glitter... but if you go on a mission with nail polish, Mom’s going to scold you.
1000629809.korean: 그건 아마 글리터... 아니, 네일하고 작전 나가면 엄마한테 혼날텐데?

1000629810.english: I’ll just act cute like a fox and get away with it.

1000629811.english: Don’t your gloves cover it up anyway?
1000629811.korean: 너는 장갑 껴서 괜찮은 거 아냐?

1000629812.english: Still, if she catches me during break time...

1000629813.english: Ah, I was supposed to borrow a face pack from Miho, but I forgot.
1000629813.korean: 아, 미호한테 팩 빌리기로 했는데 까먹었다.

1000629814.english: She was using one yesterday. Said it was nice and moisturizing.
1000629814.korean: 어제 하는 것 같더라구. 촉촉해서 좋대.

1000629818.english: Team Mongoose. We’ll begin the operation briefing.

1000629820.english: Hey, hey. I really found something pretty.

1000629823.english: And lend me the face pack too. I forgot to ask.
1000629823.korean: 그리고 팩도 빌려줘. 말하는 거 까먹었다.

1000629824.english: Then come to our room after the mission. I’ve got one cup tteokbokki left, we can share it.
1000629824.korean: 그럼 오늘 작전 끝나고 우리 방 와. 컵 떡볶이 딱 하나 남았는데 같이 먹자.

1000629827.english: Today’s mission objective is to secure the Dismantler, Azaz.
1000629827.korean: 오늘 작전 목표는 해체자 아자즈의 확보입니다.

1000629828.english: The target’s hostility has not yet been confirmed, so use of weapons is prohibited upon first contact.
1000629828.korean: 타겟의 적대 의사는 아직 확인되지 않았으니, 첫 접촉 시 무장 사용은 불허합니다.

1000629830.english: Draco. I told you not to call me that.

1000629831.english: Heheh. Operations Officer, what about that door?

1000629832.english: For now, Bulgasari will attempt a breakthrough.

1000629835.english: Based on my assessment of the door’s strength and structure, I believe I can break through it.
1000629835.korean: 문의 강도와 구조 파악 결과 제가 돌파할 수 있을 것으로 생각됩니다.

1000629837.english: Understood. Begin right after the briefing.

1000629838.english: Also, since the facility’s structure is wide and complex, Pinto and Miho will advance first.
1000629838.korean: 또한 시설의 구조가 넓고 복잡한 관계로 핀토와 미호가 선행하겠습니다.

1000629839.english: There may be active AGS units inside, so do not let your guard down.
1000629839.korean: 내부에 가동중인 AGS가 있을지도 모르니 경계를 늦추지 마세요.

1000629840.english: Operations Officer, what about the City Guard?

1000629841.english: There are various passages within the facility that lead outside.
1000629841.korean: 시설 내부 이곳저곳에 외부로 향하는 통로가 있습니다.

1000629842.english: Since the target might escape through them, the City Guard will form an external encirclement as agreed.
1000629842.korean: 타겟이 그곳을 통해 도주할 우려가 있어, 시티가드는 외부에서 포위망을 형성하기로 협의했습니다.

1000629843.english: We can’t let them steal the credit, so we’ll have to move fast, right?

1000629845.english: Still, some higher-level units came in this time, didn’t they? It won’t be easy.
1000629845.korean: 그래도 이번에 좀 높은 애들 들어왔잖아? 쉽지 않을 거야.

1000629847.english: I’ll issue detailed instructions along the way.

1000629848.english: Now then, let’s begin the operation.

1000629849.english: There’s way more of them left than I thought?

1000629850.english: Yeah... at this rate, we might lose them.

1000629851.english: The target was last confirmed heading right at the forward intersection before the signal was lost. Be careful, there are auto-turrets hidden on both walls.
1000629851.korean: 목표는 전방 삼거리에서 오른쪽으로 향하는 것까지 확인된 후 신호가 사라졌습니다. 양쪽 벽에 자동 터렛이 숨겨져 있으니 조심하세요.

1000629854.english: Ah, is that the power cable?

1000629856.english: Think you can hit it? If not, I’ll blow it up.
1000629856.korean: 맞출 수 있겠어? 아님 내가 날려버릴게.

1000629859.english: There may still be enemies not showing up on sensors, so don’t let your guard down and keep moving forward.
1000629859.korean: 신호가 잡히지 않는 적이 있을 수도 있으니 경계를 늦추지 말고 계속 전진하세요.

1000629860.english: I’ll report again if there are any unusual findings. That’s all.
1000629860.korean: 특이 사항이 있으면 다시 연락하겠습니다. 이상.

1000629862.english: You’re still uncomfortable? Mom’s really nice, though.

1000629863.english: I know. But still, it just feels weird. She’s way too by-the-book.
1000629863.korean: 나도 알아. 그래도 영 그렇단말야. 너무 FM이셔.

1000629864.english: When she’s not around, you call her Mom too, so why are you complaining~
1000629864.korean: 엄마 안계실 땐 너도 엄마라고 부르면서 왜 그래~

1000629865.english: Tch. That’s only because you all call her that, it rubbed off on me.
1000629865.korean: 쳇. 그거야 니들이 다 그렇게 부르니까 전염된거구.

1000629866.english: Why do you even call the Operations Officer “Mom” in the first place?
1000629866.korean: 대체 왜 작전관님을 엄마라고 부르는 거야?

1000629867.english: Hmm... because she feels like a mom?

1000629869.english: It’s true~ Even if she looks cold like that, she really cares about us.
1000629869.korean: 진짜야~ 저렇게 차가워보여도 얼마나 우릴 생각해주시는데.

1000629870.english: You should drop your preconceptions too and open your heart.
1000629870.korean: 너도 좀, 고정관념 버리고 마음을 열어 보라구.

1000629874.english: Yeah. Long hair just disappeared around that corner!
1000629874.korean: 응. 저기 코너로 긴 생머리가 사라졌어!

1000629879.english: Looks like you’re not badly hurt.

1000629880.english: Bulgasari, administer first aid. I’ll move ahead with Miho to scout the target.
1000629880.korean: 불가사리, 응급 치료 진행해주세요. 저는 미호와 타겟을 따라 선행 정찰을 하고 오겠습니다.

1000629881.english: You idiot! How could you charge in recklessly without me there?!
1000629881.korean: 이 바보야! 나도 없는데 그렇게 막무가내로 달려가면 어떡해!

1000629882.english: Normally I’d try to comfort you… but this time, you deserve to be called an idiot by Draco.
1000629882.korean: 웬만하면 위로해줬을텐데... 이번엔 드라코한테 바보 소리 들어도 싸다.

1000629885.english: Do you even realize how much you scared her?

1000629887.english: That’s right. It was your fault, Pinto!

1000629888.english: I’ve never seen Mom look that frightened before.
1000629888.korean: 엄마가 그렇게 놀란 얼굴 하는거 처음 봤다구.

1000629892.english: Later, make sure you apologize to Mom—huh?

1000629899.english: Don’t move! One more step and I’ll shoot!

1000629900.english: But I am staying still, you know?

1000629904.english: You, step outside for a moment.

1000629905.english: How did you end up behind us? You definitely went forward.
1000629905.korean: 당신, 어떻게 뒤로 돌아왔죠? 분명히 앞으로 갔을 텐데요.

1000629906.english: That’s true. I don’t really know myself.

1000629907.english: You’re the ones who were chasing me, right?

1000629908.english: That's right. We’re Team Mongoose! Orca’s counter-terrorism and special ops unit.
1000629908.korean: 그래. 오르카 호의 대테러 및 특수작전팀 몽구스다.

1000629909.english: Oh my, pleased to meet you!

1000629911.korean: 아, 네. 저는 불가사리... 가 아니라!

1000629912.english: Hey! What are you doing too?!

1000629913.english: I-I didn’t mean to… I just got dragged along by their pace.
1000629913.korean: 나, 나도 모르게... 이사람 페이스에 말렸어.

1000629914.english: It’s not good for your health to be so tense.

1000629915.english: I’m not moving an inch, after all.

1000629917.english: Operations Officer. We’ve located the target and are in a standoff.

1000629918.english: Yes. They’re complying for now. Yes. Yes, understood.
1000629918.korean: 네. 수하에 응하고 있습니다. 네. 네. 알겠습니다.

1000629919.english: Are you bringing your mother here?

1000629920.english: Stay put. Our Operations Officer will be here soon.
1000629920.korean: 얌전히 있어. 우리 작전관님이 곧 오실거니까.

1000629922.english: Sorry. That won’t work for me.

1000629925.english: Your systems will be back online soon.

1000629926.english: There are still plenty of AGS here, so you shouldn’t move until you’re fixed, right?
1000629926.korean: 여긴 아직 AGS들이 꽤 남아있으니까, 고쳐지기 전에 움직이면 안돼요?

1000629928.english: Bulgasari! At least you go after them!

1000629929.english: No. They’re right. Splitting up now could be dangerous.
1000629929.korean: 아냐. 저사람 말이 맞아. 여기서 갈라지면 위험할지도 몰라.

1000629930.english: Let’s wait until Mom gets here.

1000629931.english: Pinto, Bulgasari, Draco. We’re engaging security AGS over here.
1000629931.korean: 핀토, 불가사리, 드라코. 이쪽은 경비 AGS와 교전 중이에요.

1000629933.english: Apologies, Operations Officer. The target has escaped!

1000629935.english: No engagement. But Pinto’s equipment was disabled.
1000629935.korean: 교전은 없었습니다. 다만 핀토의 장비가 무력화되었습니다.

1000629937.english: Understood. Have Bulgasari and Draco watch over Pinto.
1000629937.korean: 알겠어요. 불가사리랑 드라코가 핀토를 지켜주도록 하세요.

1000629939.english: No way. They disabled her in an instant?

1000629940.english: Even her weapons system is down.

1000629942.english: I-I’m rebooting the system now. Soon…
1000629942.korean: 이, 일단 시스템 재부팅 중입니다. 곧...

1000629945.english: Miho, have you found the target’s trail?

1000629946.english: Yes. Looks like they exited to the surface through an emergency escape route in the next sector.
1000629946.korean: 네. 옆 구역에 있는 비상 탈출구를 통해 지상으로 나간 것 같아요.

1000629947.english: Haa… so we’ll have to coordinate with the City Guard after all. I really wanted to finish this inside…
1000629947.korean: 하아, 결국 시티가드와 협력해야겠군요. 가급적 안에서 끝내고 싶었는데...

1000629948.english: Hold position. I’ll make contact with the City Guard’s field commander.
1000629948.korean: 잠시 대기하세요. 시티가드측 현장 지휘관과 접촉해보겠습니다.

1000629953.english: You’re worried Mom might be disappointed?

1000629955.english: Don’t worry. Mom doesn’t get mad over things like that.
1000629955.korean: 걱정 마. 엄마, 그런걸로는 화 안내.

1000629956.english: Yeah. The only time I’ve seen her mad was when Pinto pushed herself too far.
1000629956.korean: 맞아. 엄마 화내는 건 저번에 핀토가 무리했을 때밖에 못 봤어.

1000629958.english: When Pinto ignored orders and charged in alone, right?
1000629958.korean: 핀토가 말 안듣고 혼자 진입했을 때 말이지?

1000629959.english: I swear, it felt like the whole world froze over back then.
1000629959.korean: 그땐 진짜 온세상이 얼어붙는 줄 알았다니까.

1000629960.english: Her face didn’t change at all, but somehow the atmosphere just flipped.
1000629960.korean: 분명 표정은 똑같은데 어떻게 그렇게 분위기가 바뀌는지 모르겠어.

1000629962.english: And that’s why they say raising kids doesn’t mean a thing~
1000629962.korean: 이래서 자식 키워봐야 다~ 소용 없다니까.

1000629963.english: How can you not understand a parent’s heart?

1000629964.english: Hey, if someone heard you, they’d think you’ve already had like five kids with the Commander.
1000629964.korean: 야, 누가 보면 너 사령관이랑 애 한 다섯 명쯤 낳은 줄 알겠다.

1000629966.english: We’ve heard from the City Guard field commander—they’ve also spotted the target and are moving in.
1000629966.korean: 시티가드 현장 지휘관으로부터 그쪽도 타겟을 포착하고 움직이는 중이라는 말을 들었어요.

1000629967.english: We’ll head to the surface as well to help establish the encirclement.
1000629967.korean: 우리도 지상으로 올라가서 포위망 구축을 돕겠습니다.

1000629968.english: Ah… I really don’t want to…

1000629969.english: You’re on a mission. Put your personal feelings aside.

1000629970.english: Also, the supply recon team was attacked by Metal Parasites. Once we’re topside, be especially cautious.
1000629970.korean: 그리고 물자 탐색대가 철충의 공격을 받았다는 소식입니다. 올라가서는 특히 더 주의해서 움직이도록 하세요.

1000629973.english: Pinto’s injured and her weapons aren’t in top condition. You have to protect her.
1000629973.korean: 핀토가 부상을 입은데다 무장도 제 상태가 아니니, 이번 작전 중에 핀토를 지켜주도록 하세요.

1000629975.english: Let’s go, Pinto. Stay behind me.

1000629981.english: Who’s talking trash about me? My ears are tingling.
1000629981.korean: 누가 내 욕을 하나? 귀가 간지러운데.

1000629983.english: Isn’t the Commissioner the type to make lots of enemies? Hahaha!
1000629983.korean: 경정님은 적을 많이 만드는 성격이 아닌가. 하하하!

1000629985.english: Go on with that story. You said you gave the Commander a real thrill?
1000629985.korean: 그 얘기나 계속 해봐. 사령관님한테 짜릿한 맛을 보여줬었다고?

1000629986.english: That’s exactly it! I didn’t do it myself, but I saw it clearly through this optical device!
1000629986.korean: 바로 그렇다네! 내가 한 것은 아니네만, 이 광학 장비로 똑똑히 보았다네!

1000629987.english: The reaction? Surely they trembled and let out a sweet scream?
1000629987.korean: 반응은? 분명히 몸을 떨며 달콤한 비명을 질렀겠지?

1000629988.english: Not exactly a scream. Ugh… they made a strange choking sound and then passed out immediately.
1000629988.korean: 비명이랄 것도 없었다네. 으겍, 커억 하고 이상한 소리를 내더니 곧 기절해버렸으니까.

1000629991.english: Anyway, it was just a taste. I still can’t forget the crisp, electric taste from that wind turbine!
1000629991.korean: 어쨌든 시식이었으니 말일세. 아직도 그 풍력발전 전기의 청량한 맛이 잊혀지지 않는구만!

1000629992.english: Hah… so in the end, I have no choice but to step in myself.
1000629992.korean: 하아, 결국 내가 직접 나설 수밖에 없나.

1000629993.english: Exactly… soon the Commander, unable to distinguish between pain and pleasure, will submit to me!
1000629993.korean: 그래... 곧 고통과 쾌락을 분간할 수 없게된 사령관님이 내게 굴복하게 될 거야.

1000629994.english: Hmm, let me give you a piece of advice.

1000629995.english: I haven’t observed for long, but there were a few bioroids that approached the Commander that way.
1000629995.korean: 그리 오래 보진 않았네만, 사령관에게 그런 식으로 접근한 바이오로이드가 몇몇 있었다네.

1000629996.english: Oh? How did the Commander react?

1000629997.english: At first, it seemed like they were having a bit of fun, but eventually the roles reversed, you see!
1000629997.korean: 처음에는 재미를 좀 보는가 싶었는데, 어느새 입장이 반대가 되어버리지 뭔가!

1000629999.english: Hah. Pathetic. That means those guys were only imitating.
1000629999.korean: 하. 시시해. 그렇다면 그녀석들은 흉내만 내고 있었을 뿐이야.

1000630000.english: If one truly gains pleasure from another’s suffering, the roles will never reverse.
1000630000.korean: 진정 타인의 고통에서 쾌락을 얻는다면, 입장이 바뀔 일은 없어.

1000630001.english: Hmmm… if you think about it normally, that makes sense.

1000630003.english: Commissioner, we’ve confirmed the target’s location.

1000630004.english: Good. That’ll make a suitable appetizer for tonight’s main course.
1000630004.korean: 좋아. 밤의 메인 디쉬를 위한 애피타이저로 적절하겠어.

1000630005.english: What’s the status of the containment perimeter?

1000630006.english: AGS and Bioroids under the City Guard have established a wide perimeter around the emergency exit where the target appeared.
1000630006.korean: 시티가드 소속 AGS와 바이오로이드들이 타겟이 나온 비상 출입구 주변을 넓게 포위했습니다.

1000630007.english: As you mentioned, the other exits nearby are left to the Mongoose team; no forces were deployed there.
1000630007.korean: 해당 출입구와 근처의 다른 출입구는 말씀하신대로 몽구스 팀에 맡기고 병력을 배치하진 않았습니다.

1000630008.english: The commander over there said as much, so I agreed… but I really can’t trust it completely.
1000630008.korean: 그쪽 지휘관이 그렇게 말하길래 일단 알겠다고는 했는데 말이지... 영 못미더워.

1000630009.english: Deploy my forces to this exit.
1000630009.korean: 내가 있는 이쪽 병력을 출입구에 배치해.

1000630011.english: Oh, so does that mean I’m going too?

1000630013.english: I’ll show them what a real electric shock feels like!

1000630015.english: It seems to be Metal Parasites. Prepare for combat—

1000630016.english: Hahaha. Even preparing a pre-meal drink? This chef really knows their craft.
1000630016.korean: 하핫. 식전 음료까지 준비해 주는 건가? 이 집 요리 참 잘하는군.

1000630018.english: Make sure the containment perimeter is solid so we don’t lose the target.
1000630018.korean: 타겟을 놓치지 않도록 포위망이나 잘 구성해 놓도록 해.

1000630020.english: It’s just the agreed-upon cooperative procedure.

1000630022.english: In that case, I hope you respect the operational scope of our City Guard as defined by the agreed-upon cooperative procedure.
1000630022.korean: 그렇다면 그 약속된 협력 절차로 규정된 우리 시티가드의 작전 범위를 존중해줬으면 좋겠는데.

1000630023.english: Agreed. Since the target has emerged outside, the priority goes to the City Guard.
1000630023.korean: 그렇게 하죠. 타겟이 외부로 나온 이상, 우선권은 시티가드에 있습니다.

1000630025.english: Good. Our City Guard has established a containment perimeter inside the external defense lines of Steel Line and Valhalla.
1000630025.korean: 좋아. 우리 시티가드는 스틸라인과 발할라의 외부 방어선 안쪽에 포위망을 구축해놨어.

1000630026.english: Hiding in this snowfield… where do you expect to hide? You’ll be spotted quickly…
1000630026.korean: 이런 눈밭에서 숨어봐야 어디에 숨겠어? 금방 발견될... 거...

1000630027.english: ……There’s yellow light flickering among the remains of the Metal Parasites we fought a moment ago.
1000630027.korean: ......조금 전에 싸웠던 철충의 잔해 사이에서 노란빛이 왔다갔다 하고 있군요.

1000630028.english: Are you kidding me? Can I consider this mocking of public authority?
1000630028.korean: 장난해? 이거 공권력 우롱으로 봐도 되나?

1000630029.english: I’d love to agree, but the target probably won’t acknowledge it.
1000630029.korean: 동의하고 싶은 마음은 굴뚝같지만, 타겟은 인정하지 않겠죠.

1000630032.english: You’re under a special arrest order from the Commander!

1000630033.english: I’m a bit busy right now to be arrested…

1000630034.english: Who asked for your opinion, criminal girl!
1000630034.korean: 누가 네 의견 물어봤어, 범죄자 아가씨?

1000630035.english: It’s a direct order from the Commander. No Bioroids on this land has the right to refuse.
1000630035.korean: 무려 사령관님 명령이라고. 이 땅 위의 바이오로이드에겐 거부권이 없어.

1000630036.english: Don’t make pointless resistance. We already have control here.
1000630036.korean: 무의미한 저항은 하지 말아주세요. 이곳은 이미 저희가 장악했어요.

1000630038.english: I’d prefer to resist a bit, you know. It’s been way too long since I last used this on a Bioroids.
1000630038.korean: 난 저항을 좀 하는게 좋겠는데 말이야. 바이오로이드한테 이걸 쓴 지 너무 오래됐어.

1000630039.english: Understood. I’ll surrender. I’m not fond of pain anyway.
1000630039.korean: 알았어요. 항복하죠. 아픈 건 별로 좋아하지 않아요.

1000630040.english: Wise choice. If you cooperate willingly, the Commander won’t do anything harmful to you.
1000630040.korean: 잘 생각했어요. 순순히 협조하시면 사령관님도 당신에게 해가 될만한 일은 하시지 않을 거예요.

1000630042.english: Still, we definitely accomplished something with this. A triumph for the City Guard!
1000630042.korean: 그래도 이걸로 확실히 한 건 했네. 시티가드에서 이룬 쾌거야.

1000630043.english: Alright, let’s go. With your slender wrists, handcuffs will suit you perfectly.
1000630043.korean: 자, 가자고. 아가씨는 손목이 얇아서 은팔찌가 아주 잘 어울리겠어.

1000630044.english: Ah… do we have to go right now?

1000630045.english: It’s a bit inconvenient at the moment.

1000630047.english: What nonsense is that? You’ve been arrested! Are you planning to resist public authority?
1000630047.korean: 무슨 헛소리야? 아가씨 지금 체포됐다고. 공권력에 저항할 셈이야?

1000630048.english: No, not really. I just want to keep some of the parts for myself.
1000630048.korean: 그건 아니에요. 그냥 부품을 좀 챙겨두고 싶을 뿐이니까요.

1000630049.english: In cold regions, Metal Parasites evolve in unique ways, and those parts—
1000630049.korean: 추운 지방에서는 철충이 독특한 형태로 발전하는데, 그 부품이-

1000630050.english: I’m not interested. Keep babbling like that, and I might actually use these!
1000630050.korean: 관심없거든? 계속 헛소리하면 진짜로 이걸 쓰는 수가 있어.

1000630051.english: Fine, I’ll surrender shortly. Consider my previous surrender canceled.
1000630051.korean: 그럼 조금 있다가 항복할게요. 방금 항복은 취소하구요.

1000630052.english: That’s something I won’t compromise on either.

1000630054.english: …The Commander’s going to have a tough time again.

1000630055.english: Has the candidate site been decided?

1000630057.english: There's no choice. I'll have to prioritize safety over supplies.
1000630057.korean: 어쩔 수 없지. 물자보단 안전을 기해서 정해야겠어.

1000630058.english: Yes. We'll narrow down the candidates and deploy a reconnaissance team first.
1000630058.korean: 그래. 후보지를 좁히고 정찰대를 먼저 투입해서-

1000630061.english: Is there any proof that this is lemonade?

1000630064.english: You helped? Are there factions among the Lemonades?
1000630064.korean: 도움을 줬다고? 레모네이드들 간에 파벌이 있는 거야?

1000630066.english: I'll be out of the office for a moment. You can come up with a plan to scout the candidate site.
1000630066.korean: 잠깐 자리를 좀 비울게. 후보지 정찰 계획을 짜고 있어줘.

1000630067.english: Is the factional strife among the Lemonades getting worse?

1000630068.english: Hmm... the leader of the loyalists is Omega?

1000630069.english: You're brimming with confidence. So, iron filings aren't a problem?

1000630072.english: So what do you think about this content?

1000630073.english: They're telling me to break it from the head.

1000630074.english: Okay. Since there's a supply issue, let's move to the coordinates first.
1000630074.korean: 좋아. 마침 물자 문제도 있으니까, 일단 좌표로 이동하자.

1000630075.english: We have to make sure we don't get caught. Orca won't enter the bay, but will send out a reconnaissance party first.
1000630075.korean: 안 걸리도록 해야지. 오르카는 만으로 진입하지 않고 정찰대부터 보낼거야.

1000630076.english: Okay, I guess we'll have to form a search party for supplies.

1000630078.english: Hmm. Why don't you contact me directly?
1000630078.korean: 흠. 나한테 바로 접촉하지 않는 건 왤까?

1000630082.english: There... you think there's a way to resurrect the masters.
1000630082.korean: 그곳에... 주인들을 부활시킬 방법이 있다고 생각하는 거겠지.

1000630083.english: The more I think about it, the more I don't understand. Why on earth?

1000630084.english: I'll use my command to gather all the lemonades.

1000630085.english: It would be important to stop Omega.

1000630088.english: Don't worry. I'll definitely stop it.

1000630090.english: You've worked hard. Wasn't it dangerous?

1000630091.english: The trail splits at a fork in the road inside the lab?

1000630095.english: Have you figured out the internal structure of the facility?

1000630096.english: You still don't know what's there?

1000630097.english: It would be difficult to put all our power into it right now.

1000630098.english: How about a locked door? Can you open it?
1000630098.korean: 잠겨있는 문은 어때? 열 수 있겠어?

1000630099.english: Please contact us if you need further assistance.

1000630101.english: As you take control of the lab system, can you help me find more information like this?
1000630101.korean: 연구소 시스템을 장악하면서 이런 정보도 더 찾아줄래?

1000630102.english: Omega may be trying to resurrect the masters as machines.
1000630102.korean: 오메가는 주인들을 기계로 부활시키려는 건지도 몰라.

1000630103.english: Will the presidents of the revived PECS be able to exercise their authority?
1000630103.korean: 그렇게 부활한 PECS의 회장들이 명령권을 행사할 수 있을까?

1000630104.english: Okay, I understand. Leave the entry to the combat unit, and Leanne, focus on that.
1000630104.korean: 일단 알았어. 진입은 전투부대에 맡기고 리앤은 그쪽에 집중해줘.

1000630105.english: Step back for now! I'll deploy combat units!

1000630106.english: I can put my mind at ease for now.

1000630108.english: Where do they all come from? There were hardly any Metal Parasites around the city.
1000630108.korean: 전부 어디서 오는거지? 도시 근방엔 철충이 거의 없었는데.

1000630109.english: Is it coming from afar... Is it possible that this is an attack targeting us?
1000630109.korean: 먼 거리에서 오고 있다는 건가... 우릴 목표로 한 공격일 가능성은?

1000630110.english: Looks like we're headed to the lab...?

1000630112.english: First, declare an emergency for the entire army and strengthen the defense line. We can't just sit still.
1000630112.korean: 일단 전군에 비상걸고 방어선 강화해. 가만히 있을수는 없겠어.

1000630113.english: Everyone knows the situation. Any thoughts?
1000630113.korean: 상황은 다들 알 거야. 의견 있어?

1000630114.english: How long do you think it would take to hack it open?
1000630114.korean: 해킹해서 열려면 얼마나 걸릴 것 같아?

1000630115.english: The entire engineering team, including Scathy, will have to stick together.
1000630115.korean: 스카디를 포함해서 엔지니어 팀 전원이 달라붙어야겠군.

1000630116.english: The risk is too great, that's the problem. Oh, but...
1000630116.korean: 위험 부담이 너무 커서 문제야. 아, 그런데...

1000630117.english: I told you to step back first...

1000630118.english: ...The risk is too great. The operation must be halted.

1000630119.english: Let's lay down our reconnaissance equipment and retreat. We'll probably search again later.
1000630119.korean: 정찰 장비들을 깔아두고 후퇴하자. 나중에라도 다시 수색해보는 게 좋겠어.

1000630124.english: I don't know what's going on, but that's good. I'll take command.
1000630124.korean: 무슨 일인지는 모르겠지만 다행이군. 내가 지휘할게.

1000630126.english: To be honest, I don't fully trust you yet.
1000630126.korean: 솔직히 말하지. 나는 아직 너를 완전히 신뢰하고 있지 않아.

1000630127.english: Why didn't you contact me right away?

1000630128.english: Let me verify the information you gave me one by one.
1000630128.korean: 내가 네가 준 정보를 하나씩 검증할 수 있도록 말아지.

1000630129.english: Yes. It was the laboratory of the 'Iron Prince', just as you said.
1000630129.korean: 그래. 네가 말한 대로 '철의 왕자'의 연구실이더군.

1000630131.english: I'll reserve judgment on the truth of that statement for now.
1000630131.korean: 그 말의 진위에 대해선 일단 판단을 보류하겠어.

1000630132.english: Because I have a lot of dependents.

1000630136.english: Why do you hold such a grudge? Were you abused?
1000630136.korean: 왜 그런 원한을 품었지? 학대라도 당했나?

1000630138.english: I'll discuss it with the team members first.

1000630141.english: So you're saying there's still a possibility?

1000630143.english: Yes, you can use the command.

1000630144.english: I'm going to take a lot of escorts.

1000630146.english: Don't let your guard down. Omega is in the greatest danger right now.
1000630146.korean: 경계를 늦추지 마. 지금은 오메가가 가장 위험해.

1000630147.english: Is this a diary? Did you recover the data?

1000630150.english: But the nervous systems of Metal Parasites and humans are similar...

1000630151.english: I think we need to look into it more closely.
1000630151.korean: 더 낱낱이 조사해 볼 필요가 있겠어.

1000630154.english: According to the diary, it seems like the body of the 'Iron Prince' is in the center.
1000630154.korean: 일지대로라면 중심부엔 '철의 왕자'의 시신이 있는 것 같아.

1000630155.english: I wish it was just the ramblings of a lunatic...

1000630156.english: Omega is the problem. I have no idea how it'll turn out.
1000630156.korean: 오메가가 문제야. 어떻게 나올지 전혀 예상이 안 돼.

1000630157.english: Yeah, I should meet Alpha soon.

1000630158.english: Then I'll go and come back.

1000630160.english: I thought you were going to tell me to give orders.

1000630161.english: I see. I won't tie you up. Instead...

1000630162.english: Continue what you were doing before.

1000630164.english: So that's how lemonades were born?

1000630165.english: ...Did Dr. Anna have something planned for you?
1000630165.korean: ...너에게 안나 박사가 뭔가 안배를 해 둔건가.

1000630166.english: I wouldn't have believed it before.

1000630167.english: Okay, I get the motivation. But why me?
1000630167.korean: 좋아. 동기는 알겠어. 그런데 왜 나지?

1000630168.english: ...I'll believe it for now. But I'll still be under surveillance for the time being.

1000630175.english: You ran away? One of our agents got injured because of it.
1000630175.korean: 도망친 건? 덕분에 우리 대원 하나가 다쳤어.

1000630177.english: Enough to change your tone of speech?

1000630179.english: Don't you know there's an alpha?

1000630181.english: Same idea. But the locked door...

1000630183.english: I might be surrounded from the front and back...

1000630184.english: Give the order to the troops to return. We will abandon the defense line.
1000630184.korean: 대원들에게 귀환 명령을 내려. 방어선을 포기할거야.

1000630185.english: Load the troops onto the Orca and enter here, into the underwater entrance.
1000630185.korean: 병력을 오르카 호에 태우고 여기, 해저 입구로 진입해.

1000630187.english: There are more and more Metal Parasites.

1000630188.english: Still, you never know. Keep monitoring.
1000630188.korean: 그래도 혹시 모르지. 계속 모니터링 해줘.

1000630189.english: Leanne, how's the lab system going?

1000630192.english: It's okay. The assault team will arrive soon.

1000630195.english: Anyway, that's good. Get everyone ready and tell them to open the door.
1000630195.korean: 어쨌든 다행이야. 전원 준비시키고, 문을 열라고 해.

1000630197.english: Our agents are a bit overprotective.

1000630198.english: Then how about surrendering? No... it's an order. Surrender.
1000630198.korean: 그러면 항복하는게 어때? 아니... 명령이다. 항복해.

1000630199.english: Let me ask you again: How about surrendering?
1000630199.korean: 다시 한 번 물어보지. 항복하는게 어때?

1000630200.english: The negotiations have broken down. Well, there's nothing we can do about it.
1000630200.korean: 협상 결렬이군. 그럼 어쩔 수 없지.

1000630203.english: Just tie him up. There's a lot of information to be gleaned.

1000630204.english: There will be some who will try to gather their forces again.

1000630205.english: Gamma... was it Chairman Poseidon's lemonade?

1000630206.english: I'm so glad Yong joined us.

1000630208.english: I guess I'll have to ask the agents to work a little harder.

1000630209.english: I don't even want you to serve me.
1000630209.korean: 나도 네가 날 섬기는 건 바라지도 않아.

1000630218.english: If it's just the Metal Parasites, somehow...!

1000630222.english: ...I have to find out from now on.

1000630223.english: Yes. I am enough of a human being in this world.
1000630223.korean: 그래. 이 세상에 인간은 나 하나로 충분해.

1000630227.english: Agents scouting the entrance to the research lab

1000630228.english: A search team searching for materials in the city center

1000630235.english: Cerberus really never gets tired of running around.
1000630235.korean: 켈베로스 쟤는 진짜 지치지도 않고 뛰어다니네.

1000630237.english: But doesn’t Cerberus lack animal genes?
1000630237.korean: 그런데 켈베로스 한테는 동물 유전자 없지 않아?

1000630238.english: Of course. She’s not a Companion.

1000630239.english: Still, she acts just like a slightly more mature Hachiko. There’s definitely something there.
1000630239.korean: 근데 하는 짓은 딱 정신연령 조금 올라간 하치코잖아. 뭔가 있는게 분명해.

1000630240.english: Don’t waste time with weird thoughts when you’re bored. Hand me a hot pack, my stomach’s freezing.
1000630240.korean: 심심하면 이상한 생각 하지 말고 핫팩이나 좀 줘. 배 시려 죽겠다.

1000630243.english: Looks like the situation’s over, huh? Take your hot pack back.
1000630243.korean: 아무래도 상황 종료인 모양인데? 핫팩 다시 가져가.

1000630244.english: Just got the comms. Situation confirmed as resolved.
1000630244.korean: 방금 통신 왔네. 상황 종료 맞아.

1000630245.english: But instead, they switched us to Metal Parasite alert. Here’s your hot pack.
1000630245.korean: 근데 대신에 철충 경계로 전환하래. 여기 핫팩.

1000630247.english: But that Big Sister’s kinda scary.

1000630249.english: I can’t tell what she’s thinking.

1000630250.english: Inspector Sardius is sparking with rage, but she’s just smiling while picking through Metal Parasite remains.
1000630250.korean: 사디어스 경정님이 완전 열받은 상태로 전기불꽃을 튀기고 있는데, 방긋방긋 웃으면서 철충 잔해를 뒤적거리고 있어.

1000630251.english: Okay, yeah, that is a little scary…

1000630253.english: She could be plotting an escape plan even while doing that.
1000630253.korean: 저러면서 탈출 계획을 짜고 있을지도 모르겠어.

1000630254.english: Don’t jinx it! Isn’t it your job to stop that?
1000630254.korean: 불길한 소리 하네. 그건 네가 막아야되는 거 아냐?

1000630255.english: Anyway, Mom’s right there. The moment she tries to run, her feet will be frozen solid.
1000630255.korean: 어차피 엄마가 옆에 있잖아. 도망치려는 순간 두 발이 꽁꽁 얼어붙어버릴걸?

1000630256.english: And since Mom said the situation’s over, there’s no need for us to fuss about it.
1000630256.korean: 그리고 엄마가 상황 종료랬으니 우리가 괜히 더 신경 쓸 필요는 없지, 뭐.

1000630259.english: Hey, what about Pinto? Why’d you come back alone?

1000630261.english: Pinto said she was going to, um... talk with Chief Inspector Sadius.
1000630261.korean: 핀토는 사디어스 경정님이랑 그... 이야기 좀 한다던데?

1000630263.english: Hey, how could you just leave her there!
1000630263.korean: 야, 그걸 그냥 두고 오면 어떡해!

1000630268.english: Hold your position. Metal Parasite signals are close!

1000630269.english: Mom! Pinto looks like she’s about to fight Chief Inspector Sadius!
1000630269.korean: 엄마! 핀토가 사디어스 경정님이랑 싸울 것 같아요!

1000630270.english: This is bad! The Metal Parasites aren’t the real problem!

1000630272.english: Hurry! Or at least you, Mom, go check!

1000630273.english: ...Will you three be alright on your own?

1000630274.english: We’ll be fine. So please, go stop Pinto quickly!
1000630274.korean: 충분해요. 그러니까 엄마는 빨리 핀토 좀 말려주세요!

1000630275.english: Understood. I’ll return as soon as I can.

1000630277.english: It’s not that our teammate has any ill intent.
1000630277.korean: 팀원이 악의가 있어서 그런 건 아니에요.

1000630278.english: Not at all. In fact, we should apologize. The Chief Inspector’s temper is just... harsh.
1000630278.korean: 별말씀을요. 오히려 저희가 죄송합니다. 경정님 성격이 워낙 거치셔서...

1000630279.english: I understand. It’s hard for a Bioroid to overcome the personality that’s fundamentally set.
1000630279.korean: 이해해요. 바이오로이드로서 기본적으로 설정된 성격을 이겨내는 건 어려우니까요.

1000630280.english: We’re trying hard to teach our Pinto too... but it’s not easy.
1000630280.korean: 저희 핀토도 열심히 가르치고 있지만... 쉽지 않네요.

1000630281.english: That’s very true. Especially since I’m of a lower rank myself...
1000630281.korean: 정말 그렇습니다. 특히 저는 계급이 더 낮은 편이라...

1000630282.english: Isn’t this basically a parent-teacher talk now!

1000630283.english: If it’s not rude, may I join in as well?

1000630286.english: Doing that to the Chief Inspector is on a whole different level from bickering with lower-ranked kids.
1000630286.korean: 경정님한테 그러는 건 직급 낮은 애들이랑 투닥거리는 거랑 차원이 다르다고.

1000630288.english: The Chief Inspector was being rude to Mom.

1000630290.english: Wait, is that what this was about?

1000630291.english: Ahaha, then I stopped you for nothing~

1000630292.english: We thought you were just picking a fight.
1000630292.korean: 우린 네가 그냥 시비거는 줄 알았거든.

1000630293.english: Do I look like some thug? Why would I pick a fight for no reason?

1000630294.english: Pinto, have you cooled your head a bit?

1000630298.english: It’s alright. In fact, hearing that you got angry for my sake makes me happy.
1000630298.korean: 괜찮아요. 오히려 핀토가 저를 위해 화를 내줬다는 이야기를 듣고 기뻤어요.

1000630299.english: But I was far too rash.

1000630301.english: Chief Inspector Sadius may sound harsh, but she’s fair when it comes to handling matters.
1000630301.korean: 사디어스 경정님은 표현이 그래서 그렇지, 일은 공정하게 처리하는 분입니다.

1000630302.english: You’ll have to get used to it, since we’ll be working together often.
1000630302.korean: 앞으로 협력할 일이 많을테니까 익숙해지도록 하세요.

1000630303.english: Understood, Operations Officer. From now on, I’ll...

1000630304.english: Hehe. Pinto, aren’t you going to call me Mom?

1000630306.english: C-Can I really call you Mom?

1000630310.english: After today’s mission, we were planning to have tteokbokki in Miho’s room, w-would you like to come?
1000630310.korean: 오늘 작전 끝나고 미호 방에서 떡볶이 먹기로 했는데 오, 오실래요?

1000630313.english: Since supplies came in today, there’ll be other stuff too.
1000630313.korean: 오늘 물자도 들어왔으니까 다른 것도 생길 거예요.

1000630314.english: Wow, then this’ll be the first time we hang out with the Operations Officer during our downtime, right?
1000630314.korean: 우와, 우리 그럼 쉴 때 작전관님이랑 처음으로 같이 놀겠네?

1000630315.english: Ah, I haven’t said I’d go yet...

1000630317.english: I’ll go borrow some snacks from the City Guard!
1000630317.korean: 내가 시티가드 애들한테 가서 간식 빌려올게!

1000630319.english: Hey, why the City Guard of all people!

1000630323.english: But since another operation is still underway, it’ll have to be after that one finishes.
1000630323.korean: 그래도 지금 다른 작전이 진행 중이니까 그거 끝난 다음이에요.

1000630325.english: The City Guard took the target, so let’s head back too.

1000630327.english: While evacuating the wounded and cleaning up the wrecked interior of the lab, I realized a crucial fact.
1000630327.korean: - 부상자를 후송하고, 엉망이 된 연구소 내부를 정리하다 중대한 사실을 깨달았다.

1000630328.english: I don’t even remember exactly when it stopped being visible.
1000630328.korean: - 심지어 어느 시점부터 보이지 않았는지도 기억나지 않는다.

1000630329.english: Yeah, I just realized it too!

1000630330.english: Got it. There are bloodstains here, so tracking the path will be easy.
1000630330.korean: 알았어. 여기 핏자국이 남아있어서 경로 추적은 쉬울 거야.

1000630331.english: I ordered Sleipnir to thoroughly scout the surroundings from the air and bit my lip.
1000630331.korean: - 슬레이프니르에게 상공에서 주변을 샅샅히 정찰하라고 전하고 입술을 깨물었다.

1000630332.english: If we lose Omega now, we don’t know what kind of threat it may bring us later.
1000630332.korean: - 지금 오메가를 놓치는 게 추후에 우리에게 어떤 위협으로 돌아올지 모른다.

1000630333.english: I’m tracking the signal too... but it’s not easy.

1000630334.english: To hide the signal, they even abandoned their Cestus Hymas.
1000630334.korean: 신호를 숨기기 위해 케스토스 히마스까지 버리고 갔어요.

1000630335.english: Azaz was inspecting the half-destroyed Cestus Hymas rolling on the ground.
1000630335.korean: - 반쯤 파괴된 채 바닥에 굴러다니는 케스토스 히마스를 아자즈가 이리저리 살펴보고 있었다.

1000630336.english: I never had the chance to see it this closely before... its structure is truly fascinating.
1000630336.korean: 이렇게 자세히 볼 기회는 없었는데... 정말 흥미로운 구조네요.

1000630339.english: We use the built-in modules to control this supercomputer.
1000630339.korean: 저희는 내장 모듈을 이용해 이 슈퍼 컴퓨터를 통제해요.

1000630340.english: Even if Omega cut off the pass itself, traces will remain.
1000630340.korean: 오메가가 스스로 패스를 끊어버렸더라도 그 흔적은 남아 있을 거예요.

1000630342.english: Half a day? No matter how advanced Cestus Hymas is, it shouldn’t be much against a Dismantler.
1000630342.korean: 반나절 씩이나요? 케스토스 히마스가 아무리 뛰어나다고 해도 해체자 앞에서는 별 거 아닐텐데요?

1000630343.english: I just wanted to take a look at various things.

1000630345.english: Ah, please don’t misunderstand. The location backtrace will only take 10 minutes.
1000630345.korean: 아, 오해하지 말아주세요. 위치 역추적은 10분이면 끝나니까요.

1000630346.english: In fact, I already started a little while ago... it’s done. I’ll send it to your panel, Human.
1000630346.korean: 사실 조금 전부터 하고 있어서... 됐어요. 인간님 패널로 전송할게요.

1000630347.english: I resisted the urge to clutch my head and turned on the panel.
1000630347.korean: - 머리를 감싸쥐고 싶은 것을 참으며 패널을 켰다.

1000630348.english: By now, they must have already slipped outside Sky Knights’ reconnaissance range.

1000630350.english: Master, the battlefield cleanup is finished.

1000630351.english: Nothing left. It’s all thanks to you, Master.

1000630353.english: Omega and the Iron Prince were formidable foes, and they brought other enemies under their command, but the battle itself was small in scale.
1000630353.korean: - 오메가와 철의 왕자는 강한 적이었고, 휘하에 다른 적들도 대동했지만 전투 규모 자체는 작았다.

1000630354.english: By putting strong, heavily armored units like Bloody Panther and Ignis at the front, we had minimized losses—but if large-scale battles occur in the future, there’s no guarantee the situation will remain the same.
1000630354.korean: - 블러디 팬서나 이그니스 같은, 강한 방어력을 가진 대원들을 앞세우는 방식으로 최대한 손실을 줄여왔지만 앞으로 대규모 전투가 일어날 경우 상황이 어떻게 변할지 장담할 수 없다.

1000630355.english: I’ll do that. And I’m still fine, so please have the remaining Metal Parasites in the area wiped out.
1000630355.korean: 그렇게 할게요. 그리고 저는 아직 괜찮으니까, 주변에 남은 철충들을 소탕하게 해주세요.

1000630356.english: I’ll help as well. I don’t fight physically, after all.
1000630356.korean: 저도 돕겠어요. 전 몸으로 싸우진 않으니까요.

1000630358.english: Honestly, I thought Azaz wouldn’t even care and would be entirely absorbed in dismantling the Cestus Hymas.
1000630358.korean: - 솔직히 아자즈는 신경도 안쓰고 케스토스 히마스를 분해하는데에 몰두할 줄 알았다.

1000630359.english: Oh my, did I really seem like such a shameless person to you?
1000630359.korean: 어머, 제가 그렇게 뻔뻔한 사람으로 보였나요?

1000630360.english: I left the three to handle the cleanup, and decided to sit down and rest for a moment myself.
1000630360.korean: - 셋에게 주변 정리를 맡기고, 나도 잠시 자리에 주저앉아 쉬기로 했다.

1000630361.english: Non-combat members began investigating the research facility, rotating shifts with those who had participated in the battle.
1000630361.korean: - 전투에 참여 했던 대원들과 교대로 비전투 인원들이 연구소에 대한 조사를 시작했다.

1000630362.english: After catching my breath for a short while, I forced my heavy body to stand and headed toward Leanne, who was examining the terminal.
1000630362.korean: - 잠시 한숨 돌린 나도 무거운 몸을 일으켜 단말을 살펴보는 리앤에게 향했다.

1000630363.english: Yeah. Access privileges here are much higher than outside.
1000630363.korean: 응. 여기는 바깥보다 접근 권한이 훨씬 높아.

1000630364.english: The data may be deleted, but if we take our time, we can restore it.
1000630364.korean: 삭제된 건 마찬가지지만 시간을 들이면 복구할 수 있을 거야.

1000630365.english: Looks like I’ve got work as soon as we’re back.

1000630366.english: Mind if I take a look?

1000630368.english: But I heard that the Leanne model wasn’t particularly skilled in hacking or engineering. Did you study separately?
1000630368.korean: 그런데 리앤 모델은 딱히 해킹이나 공학에 뛰어나진 않다고 들었었는데요. 따로 공부하신 건가요?

1000630370.english: It’s a bit of a long story…

1000630371.english: Leanne and Alpha exchanged opinions as they began the task of data recovery.
1000630371.korean: - 리앤과 알파는 의견을 나누며 데이터 복구를 위한 작업에 착수했다.

1000630372.english: It didn’t seem like there was anything for me to do here, so I decided to return to Orca.
1000630372.korean: - 이곳에선 내가 딱히 할 일이 없어보여서 오르카로 돌아가기로 했다.

1000630373.english: As I moved away, white wings followed close behind.
1000630373.korean: - 내가 걸음을 옮기자 하얀 날개가 바짝 따라붙었다.

1000630374.english: Yes, Master. But it only grazed me a little.

1000630375.english: Feather shook her head in embarrassment and took my hand.
1000630375.korean: - 당황스럽게 고개를 저은 페더가 내 손을 잡았다.

1000630376.english: Why are you apologizing, Master? I already owe you a debt I could never repay.
1000630376.korean: 왜 주인님이 미안해 하세요. 저는 이미 주인님한테 갚을 수 없는 은혜를 입었는걸요.

1000630377.english: Feather had fallen prey to Omega’s clutches and lost her bioroid family.
1000630377.korean: - 페더는 오메가의 마수에 걸려 가족같은 바이오로이드들을 잃었다.

1000630378.english: Lilith had been looking out for her a lot, but wounds like that don’t heal so easily.
1000630378.korean: - 리리스가 많이 신경써주고 있긴 하지만, 상처가 금방 아물리 없다.

1000630379.english: Sunny went out to stand guard, and Leader is tending to the injured.
1000630379.korean: 써니는 경계 선다고 나갔고, 리더는 다친 분들을 돌보고 계세요.

1000630380.english: Mister is completely absorbed in this research facility.
1000630380.korean: 아저씨는 이 연구소 시설에 완전히 흠뻑 빠지셨어요.

1000630381.english: And if you don’t put a “Mr.” in front, you’ll be hearing him complain for an hour.
1000630381.korean: 그리고 앞에 Mr.를 안 붙이면 또 한 시간 동안 불평을 들을 거예요.

1000630382.english: That robot with the oddly mismatched head part—would that be Mr. Alfred?
1000630382.korean: 혹시 그 몸에 어울리지 않는 머리 파츠를 달고 있는 로봇이 Mr.알프레드 씨인가요?

1000630386.english: Feather still didn’t know Azaz’s alias. Just as I tried to stop him before something went wrong, Azaz grinned.
1000630386.korean: - 페더는 아직 아자즈의 이명을 모른다. 큰일이 나기 전에 말리려는 순간, 아자즈가 씨익 웃었다.

1000630387.english: I’m joking. I wouldn’t dismantle a robot that still has power, no matter what.
1000630387.korean: 농담이에요. 아무리 그래도 동력이 살아있는 로봇을 해체하진 않아요.

1000630389.english: That’s right. I was waiting to see when you’d ask.

1000630390.english: It may have been a short time, but after dealing with so many peculiar bioroids, this much was enough for me.
1000630390.korean: - 짧은 시간이긴 하지만, 수많은 특이한 바이오로이드들을 겪어온 내겐 이정도면 충분하다.

1000630392.english: I’ll follow your words, human. Ah, so now… Commander, correct?
1000630392.korean: 인간님의 말씀을 따를게요. 아, 이제... 사령관님, 맞죠?

1000630393.english: Heh, then I’ll go pick out a room.
1000630393.korean: 후후, 그럼 저는 적당히 방을 고르러 갈게요.

1000630394.english: I’ll almost always be in my room, so if you want to see me, just come find me.
1000630394.korean: 거의 항상 방에 있을거니까 만나려면 찾아오시면 돼요.

1000630396.english: I… thought Leader was the most peculiar person in the world.
1000630396.korean: 저는... 리더가 세상에서 제일 특이한 사람인 줄 알았어요.

1000630397.english: -Still holding Feather’s hand, I could only blankly watch Azaz’s back as he walked away.
1000630397.korean: -나는 페더와 손을 잡은 채로 멍하니 아자즈의 뒷모습을 바라볼 수밖에 없었다.

1000630398.english: Several days passed after temporary quarters for Orca’s technical staff were set up inside the lab.
1000630398.korean: - 연구소 내부에 오르카 기술진들의 임시 숙소가 세워지고 며칠이 지났다.

1000630399.english: The damage from the large battle had mostly been repaired, life returned to routine, and just as I was getting used to Azaz’s reckless, self-centered pace, Alpha requested a meeting.
1000630399.korean: - 큰 전투로 인한 피해가 대부분 복구되어 평소 일과로 돌아오고, 아자즈의 대책없는 마이페이스에도 익숙해질때 쯤, 알파가 면담을 요청했다.

1000630402.english: Alpha met my eyes, smiled gently, and lifted her teacup.
1000630402.korean: - 나와 눈이 마주친 알파가 부드럽게 웃으며 찻잔을 들었다.

1000630403.english: It’s thanks to you, Commander, that they all made it this far alive.
1000630403.korean: 사령관님 덕분에 저분들이 여기까지 살아서 온 거기도 해요.

1000630404.english: Alpha had grown noticeably more courteous of late.

1000630405.english: Though she failed to catch Omega, she must have seen in me the possibility of achieving her revenge.
1000630405.korean: - 비록 오메가를 놓치긴 했지만, 내게서 자신의 복수를 이룰 가능성을 보았기 때문이겠지.

1000630406.english: What do you intend to do from here?

1000630407.english: A clash with Omega was inevitable sooner or later. If that’s the case, I should even consider a preemptive strike.
1000630407.korean: - 어차피 오메가와는 언젠가 다시 부딪힐 수밖에 없었다. 그렇다면 선제 공격도 고려해봐야한다.

1000630408.english: Of course. I’ve been preparing for this very moment.
1000630408.korean: 물론이죠. 지금 이 순간을 위해 준비해 왔어요.

1000630409.english: Everything I have already belongs to you, Commander. But…
1000630409.korean: 제가 가진 모든 것은 이미 사령관님 것이에요. 그런데...

1000630411.english: I’ve overcome countless dangers before, but the Star Children, the high-level Connector Nest, Omega’s forces, and the Iron Prince I’ve encountered recently were on an entirely different level.
1000630411.korean: - 지금껏 수많은 위험을 넘어왔지만, 최근들어 마주친 별의 아이와 고위 연결체 네스트, 오메가 세력과 철의 왕자는 그 격이 달랐다.

1000630412.english: And that Metal Parasite resembling the Executioner that carried off the Iron Prince…
1000630412.korean: - 거기다 철의 왕자를 데려간 그 익스큐셔너를 닮은 철충은...

1000630413.english: I can’t even begin to guess the sacrifices it would take to oppose them.
1000630413.korean: - 상대하려면 어떤 희생을 치러야할지 짐작조차 되지 않는다.

1000630414.english: You’re planning to expand your forces, aren’t you?

1000630415.english: The plan to expand was already in place—the only question was timing.
1000630415.korean: - 시기가 문제일 뿐, 세력을 확장할 계획은 이미 짜여있다.

1000630416.english: Now, with the Metal Parasites relatively inactive, it would be the best opportunity, but there were more factors to weigh than I expected.
1000630416.korean: - 철충이 적극적으로 활동하지 않는 지금이 적기이지만, 생각보다 여러가지 따질 것이 많았다.

1000630417.english: As I’ve said before, make use of my abilities.
1000630417.korean: 전에도 말씀드렸지만, 제 능력을 사용해 주세요.

1000630419.english: Do you happen to know what word they used before the name Lemonade?
1000630419.korean: 과거에 레모네이드라는 이름 앞에 어떤 단어가 붙었는지, 혹시 아시나요?

1000630421.english: The hacking abilities we Lemonades possess are just a secondary function.
1000630421.korean: 저희 레모네이드들이 가진 해킹 능력은 부가적인 거예요.

1000630422.english: Would you believe me if I said this Cestus Hymas was once mainly used for a company’s system administration?
1000630422.korean: 예전엔 이 케스토스 히마스를 주로 회사의 전산관리에 썼다고 하면 믿으시겠어요?

1000630423.english: That’s entirely plausible. In the end, combat ability is what matters now.
1000630423.korean: 충분히 그럴 수 있어요. 지금은 결국 전투력이 중요하니까요.

1000630424.english: But for someone like you, Commander—someone leading a large organization—many things besides combat strength will be necessary.
1000630424.korean: 하지만 사령관님 같은, 커다란 집단을 이끄시는 분에겐 전투력 말고도 여러가지가 필요할거예요.

1000630425.english: Even I spend more time handling administrative tasks than commanding battles or drafting strategies.
1000630425.korean: - 당장 나부터가 전투를 지휘하거나 군략을 짜는 시간보다 행정 업무를 처리하는 시간이 더 길다.

1000630426.english: Orca may have many outstanding people, but when it comes to running an organization like a corporation, I can confidently say none can match me.
1000630426.korean: 오르카에는 여러 훌륭하신 분들이 많이 있지만, 기업과 같은 집단을 경영하는데에는 저를 따라올 분이 없다고 감히 말씀드릴 수 있어요.

1000630428.english: Alpha rose from her seat—then quietly lowered herself to her knees on the floor.
1000630428.korean: - 알파가 자리에서 일어나나 싶더니 바닥에 다소곳이 무릎을 꿇었다.

1000630429.english: Secretary Lemonade Alpha will serve you forever, master.
1000630429.korean: 비서 레모네이드 알파는, 사령관님을 주인님으로 모시겠어요.

1000630430.english: Then, as your secretary, I’ll begin my first task at once.
1000630430.korean: 그럼 주인님의 비서로서의 첫 업무를 바로 시작할게요.

1000630431.english: It’s the information I mentioned earlier.

1000630432.english: It’s not far. There’s a hideout near the place where you first met me.
1000630432.korean: 멀지 않아요. 저번에 저를 처음으로 만난 곳 근처에 은신처가 있거든요.

1000630433.english: I summoned the Companions and long-range escort squad, then rose to my feet.
1000630433.korean: - 컴패니언과 원거리 호위 대원들을 호출하고 자리에서 일어났다.

1000630434.english: Following Lemonade, I boarded the elevator and descended underground.
1000630434.korean: - 레모네이드를 따라 승강기를 타고 지하로 내려갔다.

1000630435.english: When the rattling lift came to a stop, I stepped into a small subterranean chamber resembling a laboratory.
1000630435.korean: - 덜컹이는 승강기가 멈추고, 연구실 비슷한 작은 지하 공간에 발을 디뎠다.

1000630437.english: This hideout was prepared once I learned Omega had taken an interest in the Iron Prince’s lab.
1000630437.korean: 오메가가 철의 왕자의 연구실에 관심을 갖는다는 걸 알고 나서 마련한 은신처에요.

1000630438.english: Heheh, no need to quote proverbs, right?
1000630438.korean: 후훗, 굳이 속담을 인용할 필요는 없겠죠?

1000630439.english: Alpha walked with practiced steps toward the clustered terminals.
1000630439.korean: - 알파는 익숙한 발걸음으로 모여있는 단말들 앞으로 향했다.

1000630440.english: After a few quick commands, an image appeared on the large screen.
1000630440.korean: - 몇 번 조작하자, 커다란 스크린에 화상이 떠올랐다.

1000630441.english: In the middle of a vast stretch of blackened land stood a pillar.
1000630441.korean: - 넓게 펼쳐진 검은 땅 한가운데에 기둥이 서있었다.

1000630442.english: That’s a tower. It only looks that way because it was shot from a distance.
1000630442.korean: 탑이에요. 멀리서 찍어서 그렇게 보이는 거죠.

1000630443.english: Looking closer, what had seemed like black ground was actually a seething mass of Metal Parasites.
1000630443.korean: - 자세히 보니 검은 땅처럼 보였던 것은 전부 철충이었다.

1000630444.english: Among the information stolen from Omega, this is the most important piece.
1000630444.korean: 오메가에게서 빼돌린 정보 중에 가장 중요한 거예요.

1000630445.english: True to the expression, a shiver of cold sweat ran down my back at the sight of Metal Parasites packed so densely they blotted out the horizon.
1000630445.korean: - 관용적인 표현 그대로, 새까맣게 들어차 지평선을 가득 메우는 철충의 숫자에 나도 모르게 식은땀이 흘렀다.

1000630446.english: I couldn’t find out any more than that. Omega supposedly discovered it purely by accident.
1000630446.korean: 그것까지는 알아내지 못했어요. 오메가도 정말 우연히 발견했다고 해요.

1000630447.english: Hearing Alpha explain that an immense invisible field blanketing the area made it impossible to detect even by satellite imagery, I was utterly shaken.
1000630447.korean: - 저 넓은 범위를 뒤덮는 불가시 역장 때문에 위성 사진으로도 발견할 수 없었다는 알파의 말에 완전히 기가 질리고 말았다.

1000630448.english: I don’t know the exact location, but there are several possible sites.
1000630448.korean: 정확한 위치는 모르지만 몇 군데 후보지는 있죠.

1000630449.english: The Metal Parasites are mining minerals across the globe. Did you know that?
1000630449.korean: 철충들은 세계 각지에서 광물을 채굴하고 있어요. 알고 계시나요?

1000630450.english: When I told her about the raids we periodically launched on their mines to seize resources, Alpha burst out laughing.
1000630450.korean: - 주기적으로 철충들의 광산을 급습해서 광물을 빼온다는 사실을 말해주자 알파가 웃음을 터뜨렸다.

1000630451.english: My goodness… that’s not something any sane person would do.

1000630452.english: You’re incredibly bold. If Omega were to hear of it, he might even acknowledge you, Master.
1000630452.korean: 정말 과감하시네요. 오메가에게 들려주면 주인님을 인정할지도 몰라요.

1000630453.english: Hehe. Anyway, the Metal Parasites transport all those minerals here, to this tower.
1000630453.korean: 후후. 어쨌든, 철충들은 그 광물들을 이 탑으로 수송해와요.

1000630454.english: As for what they use them for, or what goes on inside the tower—we have no idea.
1000630454.korean: 그 광물을 어디에 쓰는지, 탑 안에서는 무슨 일이 벌어지는지는 전혀 모르구요.

1000630455.english: Perhaps that so-called Pope of the Metal Parasites is there.
1000630455.korean: - 어쩌면 그 교황이라는 철충이 저곳에 있을 수도 있다.

1000630456.english: I think so too. Otherwise they wouldn’t have prepared such defenses.
1000630456.korean: 저도 같은 생각이에요. 그렇지 않다면 저렇게 대비를 해둘리가 없죠.

1000630457.english: We’ll need to start looking for a way to attack. If we don’t strike before the Metal Parasites end their dormancy, our chances of survival will drop sharply.
1000630457.korean: 공격할 방법을 이제부터 찾아봐야죠. 철충의 휴식기가 끝나기 전에 타격을 입혀야 저희가 생존할 확률이 높아져요.

1000630458.english: At Alpha’s words, I zoomed in on the image.

1000630459.english: The resolution was somewhat blurry, but it was clear that countless Metal Parasites were huddled together as if in hibernation.
1000630459.korean: - 화질이 조금 뭉개지긴 했지만, 셀 수 없이 많은 철충들이 마치 겨울잠을 자는 것처럼 몸을 다닥다닥 붙이고 있는 것은 확인할 수 있었다.

1000630460.english: I feel the same. It may sound strange for me to say this, but Lemonades never forget a grudge.
1000630460.korean: 저도 그래요. 제가 이런말을 하기엔 좀 그렇지만, 레모네이드들은 원한을 절대 잊지 않거든요.

1000630461.english: Oh my, that’s a bit much.

1000630462.english: The Metal Parasites, the Children of the Star, the Bioroid factions including Omega, and now even the Iron Prince, whose allegiance remains unclear.
1000630462.korean: - 철충, 별의 아이, 오메가를 비롯한 바이오로이드 세력과 소속은 모호하지만 철의 왕자까지.

1000630463.english: One by one, I recalled the faces of the squadmates who had saved me, taught me, and kept me alive until now.
1000630463.korean: - 나를 구해주고, 가르치고, 지금까지 살아남게 해준 대원들의 얼굴을 하나하나 떠올렸다.

1000630464.english: Countless enemies stood before us, but I steeled my heart—determined to protect the Orca squad, who were as much my family as anyone could be.
1000630464.korean: - 수많은 적이 우리 앞에 있지만, 내 가족이나 다름없는 오르카 대원들을 지키기 위해 마음을 굳게 먹기로 다짐했다.

1000630467.english: I'll contact Sky Knights, so search the inside.
1000630467.korean: 난 스카이나이츠에 연락할 테니까, 내부를 수색해줘.

1000630468.english: Could you possibly use that to track down Omega?
1000630468.korean: 혹시 그걸 이용해서 오메가를 추적할 수 있겠어?

1000630469.english: How long do you think it will take?

1000630470.english: It's too late... but please proceed anyway.

1000630473.english: The signal continued east and then was cut off.

1000630474.english: Still, we have to chase after it.

1000630478.english: Send the wounded to the recovery room, set up minimal security, and let the team rest.
1000630478.korean: 부상자들 수복실로 보내고, 최소한의 경계만 세우고 대원들 쉬게 해줘.

1000630479.english: That would be great... Is that okay?

1000630483.english: How is it? Do you think you can salvage it?
1000630483.korean: 어때? 좀 건질 수 있을 것 같아?

1000630484.english: There shouldn't be a problem with those two...

1000630488.english: I don't really want to ask, but... what about Alfred?

1000630491.english: So it seems like your whereabouts are definitely stable?
1000630491.korean: 그러보니 네 거취를 확실히 안정한 것 같은데?

1000630493.english: If you want to be in Orca, you can be there.

1000630494.english: Because we live in an environment where that is unavoidable.

1000630498.english: Is the data recovery going well?

1000630499.english: Thanks to you, I came here alive.
1000630499.korean: 그덕분에 내가 살아서 여기까지 온 거야.

1000630500.english: I need to grow my power. If I have time, I'll take revenge on you.
1000630500.korean: 세력을 더 키워야지. 시간 남으면 네 복수도 해줄게.

1000630501.english: Give me all the information about PECS now.
1000630501.korean: 지금의 PECS에 대한 정보를 전부 넘겨줘.

1000630502.english: Anything else? Small groups to absorb, supply bases, anything.
1000630502.korean: 다른 것도 있어? 흡수할만한 소규모 집단이나, 보급 거점 등등. 뭐라도 좋아.

1000630503.english: Because I saw something like that.

1000630505.english: Hacking is difficult because it is not a direct method.

1000630510.english: Okay. I'll use you a lot from now on.

1000630512.english: Do I have to go out?

1000630514.english: It's right in front of your nose! How brave.

1000630516.english: A tower? Then that black thing...
1000630516.korean: 탑이라고? 그럼 저 검은 건 설마...

1000630517.english: Yeah, I see. That's not all there is to it.
1000630517.korean: 응. 그래보여. 저것도 철충의 전부가 아니겠지.

1000630519.english: It must be a place with wide land and high density of iron beetles.
1000630519.korean: 넓은 땅과 높은 철충 밀도를 가진 곳이겠지.

1000630523.english: Well... at first glance, it looks like a very important facility.
1000630523.korean: 뭐... 딱 봐도 굉장히 중요한 시설 같아 보이긴 하는데.

1000630524.english: But even if we had a thousand Orca ships, it wouldn't be enough to attack that thing.
1000630524.korean: 그런데 저걸 공격하려면 오르카 호가 천 대가 있어도 모자라겠어.

1000630525.english: ...Yeah. If you get hurt, you have to pay it back.

1000630527.english: - After the events in the fairy village, the Orca continued its voyage under the calm sea.
1000630527.korean: - 요정 마을에서의 사건들이 끝난 뒤, 오르카호는 다시 고요한 바다 아래에서 항해를 계속했다.

1000630528.english: - But if there's one thing that's different from before...
1000630528.korean: - 그러나 전과 달리 한 가지 달라진 점이 있다면…

1000630529.english: Master~ Master~~ Besides the report, please take a look at me too.
1000630529.korean: 주인님~ 주인님~~ 보고서 말고 나도 조금 봐주세요.

1000630530.english: - The thing was that there was a big black cat in Orca.
1000630530.korean: - 오르카호에 커다란 검은 고양이가 생겼다는 점이었다.

1000630531.english: - After Robert's attack, Lilith actively expressed her opinion that I should strengthen my security.
1000630531.korean: - 로버트의 습격 이후 리리스는 나의 경호를 강화해야 한다고 적극적으로 의견을 토해냈고,

1000630532.english: - She showed me a gene that had been discarded by a past companion. A black cat that was created as a prototype for Perrault… .
1000630532.korean: - 그녀는 과거 컴패니언에 폐기되었던 어느 한 유전자를 내게 보여주었다. 페로의 프로토타입으로 만들어졌다는 검은 고양이….

1000630533.english: - Although Perrault was vehemently opposed, he eventually accepted the opinion of our captain of the guards, who said, 'In order to increase the power of the Orca,' and restored the Poi.
1000630533.korean: - 페로는 격렬히 반대하였지만, 결국 '오르카호의 전력증강을 위해서' 라는 우리 경호대장의 의견을 받아들여 포이를 복원시켰다.

1000630535.english: You know, Master, there's something attractive about my face, right? But there's another attractive thing about my body, don't you want to see where it is?
1000630535.korean: 있잖아요, 주인님~ 제 얼굴에 매력적인 점이 하나 있잖아요? 그런데 제 몸에 매력적인 점이 하나 더 있는데 어디 있는지 보고 싶지 않아요?

1000630536.english: Poi wagged her tail and clung to me. I could feel the soft, plump texture of her breasts against my back.
1000630536.korean: - 포이는 꼬리를 흔들며 내게 달라붙었다. 등 뒤로 그녀의 커다랗고 푹신한 가슴의 촉감이 전해졌다.

1000630538.english: Down the collarbone… to Poi's chest…

1000630539.english: Poi! What are you doing now?
1000630539.korean: 포이! 지금 뭐 하고 있는 거죠?

1000630540.english: - Thanks to Perrault coming in at the right time, I was able to survive Poi's clutches.
1000630540.korean: - 그때 마침 페로가 적절하게 들어온 덕분에 나는 포이의 마수로부터 살아남을 수 있었다.

1000630541.english: The owner is working, so please stay away.
1000630541.korean: 주인님이 업무를 보고 계시는 중이잖아요. 조금 떨어져 계세요.

1000630542.english: Welcome, Sister Perrault. But I think you're misunderstanding something. Isn't this exactly how Poi's security is done?
1000630542.korean: 어서 와. 페로 언니. 그런데 뭔가 오해를 하고 있는 거 같은데, 이게 바로 포이의 경호 방식인걸?

1000630543.english: Bullets might come flying through the window, so we have to be this close~ Yeah, yeah? It's super close protection. You could call it a luxury escort, right?
1000630543.korean: 저기 창문을 통해 총알이 날아올 수 있으니 이렇게 밀착해서~ 응응? 초 밀착 호위인 거야. 말하자면 호위호식 이랄까?

1000630544.english: We're underwater right now, so there's no way bullets will fly, Poi.
1000630544.korean: 여긴 지금 바닷속이라 총알이 날아올 일은 없어요, 포이.

1000630546.english: Poi, stop fooling around. Remember, Sister Lilith restored you to protect her master.
1000630546.korean: 포이, 장난은 그만하세요. 리리스 언니가 당신을 복원한 이유는 주인님의 경호를 위해서라는 걸 잊지 말아 주세요.

1000630547.english: No, the reason Sister Lilith restored Poi is because Poi is stronger than Sister Perrault.
1000630547.korean: 아니, 리리스 언니가 포이를 복원해 준 이유는 포이가 페로 언니 보다 강하기 때문이야.

1000630548.english: Huh, Master, you seem to be having a hard time because of Poi right now. Isn't that right, Master?
1000630548.korean: 흥, 지금 주인님도 포이 때문에 곤란해 보이시잖아요. 그렇죠, 주인님?

1000630549.english: But, it seems like the master doesn't dislike this kind of thing either. Right, master?
1000630549.korean: 그치만, 주인님도 이런 걸 싫어하진 않는 모양이신데. 그렇죠, 주인님?

1000630550.english: - Perrault and Poi pushed me forward and backward, their faces thrusting into mine.
1000630550.korean: - 페로와 포이는 앞뒤로 얼굴을 들이밀며 내게 밀어붙였다.

1000630552.english: You see? The master prefers Poy's ample breasts. Perhaps Unnie Perrault's slightly lacking breasts aren't enough to satisfy him?
1000630552.korean: 봤지? 주인님은 포이의 풍만한 가슴을 더 좋아한다구, 페로 언니의 살짝 부족한 가슴으로는 주인님을 충분히 만족시켜드리지 못하는게 아닐까?

1000630553.english: Me… I'm flat. Who says I'm flat? I'm just right, so that's good, right?
1000630553.korean: 나… 납작하기는 누가 납작하다는 거죠. 저는 딱 적당해서 좋은 거거든요?

1000630554.english: Oh my, what is this commotion in front of the master, Poi, Perrault?
1000630554.korean: 어머, 주인님 앞에서 이게 무슨 소란이니 포이, 페로?

1000630556.english: Hmm… The master is working right now, so how about staying away for a bit, Poi?
1000630556.korean: 흠… 주인님은 지금 업무를 보고 계시는 중이니 조금 떨어져 있는 게 어떻겠니, 포이?

1000630558.english: - After hearing Lilith's point, Poi slowly moved away from me and stood quietly.
1000630558.korean: - 리리스의 지적을 듣고, 포이는 천천히 내게서 떨어져 다소곳하게 섰다.

1000630560.english: Huh, you see? The master hates things that stick to him like poi.
1000630560.korean: 흥, 보셨죠? 주인님은 포이처럼 끈적하게 달라붙는 걸 싫어 하신다구요.

1000630562.english: What's all this fuss, Perrault, Poi?

1000630564.english: Did Poi cause any trouble, Master?
1000630564.korean: 포이가 무슨 문제는 안 일으켰나요, 주인님?

1000630565.english: That's unnecessary worry. Poi is faithfully guarding the Master.
1000630565.korean: 괜한 걱정이에요, 포이는 성실히 주인님을 경호하고 있는걸요?

1000630566.english: Is that so? Then that's a relief.

1000630567.english: Master, this week's security report is out.
1000630567.korean: 주인님, 이번 주 경호 보고서가 나왔습니다.

1000630568.english: As I received the file case Lilith handed me, a dizzying floral scent stung my nose.
1000630568.korean: - 리리스가 건네준 파일 케이스를 받자 아찔한 꽃향기가 코를 찔렀다.

1000630569.english: Yes, I thought it would be nice if my scent lingered in your room, Master, even just a little. Hehe, what do you think?
1000630569.korean: 네, 저의 향기가 조금이라도 주인님의 방에 머물렀으면 좋을 것 같아서요. 후훗 어떠신가요?

1000630570.english: By the way, Perrault? What brings you to your master's room? It's your day off today.
1000630570.korean: 그런데 페로? 주인님의 방에 어쩐 일로 있는 거니? 오늘 쉬는 날이잖니.

1000630571.english: The thing is... I was worried that Poi might play a really bad prank on Master...
1000630571.korean: 그게.. 혹시 포이가 주인님에게 심한 장난을 칠까 걱정돼서...

1000630572.english: Poi is doing more than enough. Right, Perrault Unnie?
1000630572.korean: 포이는 충분히 잘~ 하고 있는걸. 그렇지, 페. 로. 언. 니?

1000630573.english: Poi stuck out his lips at Ferro and teased him.
1000630573.korean: - 포이는 페로를 향해 입술을 내밀며 약을 올렸다.

1000630575.english: Since Poi is your bodyguard today, Master, we'll be heading back now, Master.
1000630575.korean: 오늘 주인님의 경호원은 포이니까 저희는 그럼 이만 돌아가 볼게요, 주인님.

1000630576.english: Ferro glared fiercely at Poi, but perhaps sensing the growing chill in the atmosphere, he soon averted his gaze.
1000630576.korean: - 페로는 포이를 매섭게 노려봤지만 싸늘해지는 분위기를 의식했는지, 이내 시선을 거두었다.

1000630577.english: Since it is his first day on duty, please be understanding if Poi causes a little trouble. I beg of you, Master.
1000630577.korean: 첫 근무이니 만큼, 포이가 조금 말썽 부리더라도 너그럽게 봐주세요, 부탁드려요 주인님.

1000630579.english: - Alright... then shall we try writing the report again...

1000630580.english: After Lilith and her party left, Poi stayed by my side very quietly for a while.
1000630580.korean: - 리리스 일행이 간 뒤, 포이는 한동안 정말 얌전히 내 옆을 지키고 있었다.

1000630581.english: However, as time went by, he lingered around, and soon he was pressing his face against the desk again.
1000630581.korean: - 그러나 점점 시간이 지날수록 주변을 서성거리더니, 이내 다시 책상 앞에 얼굴을 들이밀고 있었다.

1000630582.english: Hey, Master. Isn't it a bit hot up there? I think Poi is sweating...
1000630582.korean: 저기~ 주인님. 여기 조금 덥지 않나요? 포이 땀 차는 거 같은데…

1000630583.english: No, the ship's power is precious, so there is no need to expend it for a mere combatant like me.
1000630583.korean: 아니요, 함내의 전력은 소중하니 저 같은 일개 전투원을 위해 전력을 소비하실 필요는 없으세요.

1000630584.english: But, um... there is sweat here, below my chest...
1000630584.korean: 그렇지만, 음… 여기 가슴 아래에 땀이…

1000630585.english: Poi carefully lifted his large, firm chest with his hand and wiped the sweat from beneath it.
1000630585.korean: - 포이는 손으로 조심스럽게 자신의 커다랗고 탱탱한 가슴을 들어 올리며 가슴 밑의 땀을 훑어냈다.

1000630586.english: Haa... Haa... It feels a bit hot... but the air conditioner is a waste of electricity,
1000630586.korean: 하아… 하아... 조금 더운 거 같은데.. 에어컨은 전력 낭비이니,

1000630587.english: Poi... I think Poi needs to take off a little bit of his clothes. What do you think, Commander?
1000630587.korean: 포이가.. 포이가 조금 벗어야 할 거 같은데, 사령관님 생각은 어떠세요?

1000630588.english: Kyaaha. Commander, it's okay if Poi takes off a little bit of her clothes, right? Right?
1000630588.korean: 꺄핫. 사령관님 포이가 조금 벗어도 되겠죠? 그렇죠?

1000630589.english: My body is getting hot... I don't think I can hold out any longer... Master? Just a little... just a tiny bit...
1000630589.korean: 몸이 뜨거워져서… 더는 못 버틸 것 같아요… 주인님? 조금만... 아주 조금만..

1000630592.english: Hey, Commander. For a new dessert today…

1000630597.english: Huh? By the way, is there a problem?

1000630598.english: Poi, what are you doing? You're supposed to be on guard duty...!
1000630598.korean: 포이, 지금 무슨 짓이야. 경호 중이면서…!

1000630599.english: As I said before, this is Poi's style of security, so you don't need to worry about it, Sister Ferro, okay?
1000630599.korean: 저번에도 말했듯이 이건 포이 스타일의 경호방식이니 페로언니는 신경 쓰지 않으셔도 괜찮다구요?

1000630601.english: - Perrault purred at Poi and glared fiercely.
1000630601.korean: - 페로는 포이를 향해 갸르릉대며, 매섭게 노려봤다.

1000630603.english: I am sorry, Master. For constantly showing you my disheveled side.
1000630603.korean: 죄송합니다, 주인님. 주인님 앞에서 자꾸 흐트러진 모습을 보여드려서.

1000630605.english: Master, if you say so… I will gratefully enjoy this meal.
1000630605.korean: 주, 주인님이 그렇게 말씀하신다면… 감사히 잘 먹겠습니다.

1000630607.english: I dragged the chairs over and placed them on both sides of the table.
1000630607.korean: - 나는 테이블 양옆으로 의자들을 끌고 와 놔두었다.

1000630610.english: However, Perrault and Poi approached, ignoring the chairs next to me...
1000630610.korean: - 그러나 페로와 포이는 내 옆의 의자들을 무시하며 다가오더니...

1000630611.english: We were pushing each other to sit on my lap.
1000630611.korean: - 서로 내 무릎 위에 앉으려고 몸을 밀고 있었다.

1000630612.english: Master, that spot on your lap has been mine for a long time. Poi?
1000630612.korean: 주인님의 무릎 위는 예전부터 내 자리였다구.  포이?

1000630613.english: Hmph, do you even realize I'm the prototype for the Ferro model? The first one to come into the world was Foy's model. So, strictly speaking, aren't I the older one?
1000630613.korean: 흥, 내가 페로 모델의 프로토타입인 건 알고 하는 소리야? 세상에 먼저 나온 건 포이의 모델이였어. 그러니 따지자면 내가 언니인 거 아니야?

1000630614.english: And he keeps picking on Poi; surely he's not jealous of Poi, is he?
1000630614.korean: 그리고 계속 포이한테 딴죽을 거는데 설마 포이를 질투하는 거 아니야?

1000630616.english: The two cats started bickering over my lap.
1000630616.korean: - 내 무릎을 두고 두 고양이는 티격태격 싸우기 시작했다.

1000630617.english: Damn it, I don't know anymore.

1000630620.english: I stepped in to mediate between the two, and as a result, Poi and Pero ended up sitting on one of my knees each.
1000630620.korean: - 나는 둘을 중재하기에 나섰고, 결과적으로 포이와 페로는 내 양 무릎에 한쪽씩 앉게 되었다.

1000630621.english: What? Did you say it was a master knee competition..?

1000630622.english: I will give a prize to the person who sits on one knee at a time and makes me feel better.
1000630622.korean: - 내 무릎 위에 한쪽씩 앉아서 더 기분을 좋게 해주는 사람에게는 상을 주도록 할게.

1000630623.english: If Master says so, then I’m fine. If you don’t want to, then forfeit, Unnie Pero.
1000630623.korean: 주인님이 그렇게 말씀하신다면야 저는 좋아요. 싫다면 기권하시죠 페로 언. 니. ?

1000630624.english: Who said they didn't like it?

1000630625.english: The two of them grumbled and pretended to dislike each other, but in the end, I was able to get them to sit on my lap one by one.
1000630625.korean: - 둘은 서로에게 싫은 척 투덜댔지만, 결과적으로 내 무릎 위로 한 명씩 앉힐 수가 있었다.

1000630626.english: - Anyway, today's dessert is... chocolate meat pie, I guess...
1000630626.korean: - 그건 그렇고, 오늘의 디저트는... 초코 미트 파이인가….

1000630627.english: - This dessert reminds me very much of someone. Could it be that the person who recently influenced Aurora is in the kitchen?
1000630627.korean: - 굉장히 누군가가 생각나는 디저트이다. 혹시 최근 아우로라에게 영향을 끼친 인물이 주방에 있는 것일까?

1000630628.english: Yes, this is the dessert Hachiko made in the kitchen today with Miss Aurora.
1000630628.korean: 네, 오늘 주방에서 하치코가 아우로라 양과 함께 만든 디저트입니다.

1000630629.english: Thanks to me stopping them from adding mint, the chocolate meat pie was born.
1000630629.korean: 민트까지 넣으려는 걸 제가 말린 덕분에 초코 미트 파이가 탄생하게 되었죠.

1000630630.english: - I see… Since this is food that Aurora and Hachiko put their heart and soul into, I can't leave any behind.
1000630630.korean: - 그런가… 아우로라와 하치코의 정성이 들어간 음식이니, 남겨선 안되겠지.

1000630632.english: Oh my, Poi, are you really refusing my master's favor right now?
1000630632.korean: 어머, 포이 설마 지금 주인님의 호의를 거절하는 거니?

1000630634.english: I just thought it would be nice if the owner fed me.
1000630634.korean: 저는 그저 주인님이 먹여줬으면 좋겠다고 생각했을 뿐이에요.

1000630635.english: Master, please give Poi a bite to eat.
1000630635.korean: 주인님 포이에게 어서 한 입............ 떠먹여 주세요.

1000630636.english: - I put the big, thick thing into Poi's mouth.
1000630636.korean: - 나는 크고 걸쭉한 그것을 포이의 입안에 집어넣었다.

1000630638.english: - Poi munched on the meat pie in his mouth for a moment… .
1000630638.korean: - 포이는 잠깐 입안에서 미트 파이를 우물거리더니….

1000630640.english: - Although he let out a somewhat strange groan, he managed to swallow the meat pie in his mouth.
1000630640.korean: - 다소 괴상한 신음소리를 흘리긴 했지만, 입안의 미트 파이를 삼키는데 성공했다.

1000630641.english: Haa... haa... Master, I ate it all. Did I do well?
1000630641.korean: 하아… 하아... 주인님 나 다 먹었어요. 잘했죠?

1000630642.english: - I think it was a good idea to feed Poi first.
1000630642.korean: - 먼저 포이에게 먹이길 잘한 것 같다.

1000630644.english: Huh? Perrault, you. What's wrong? The master said he'd give it to you, so you don't want to?
1000630644.korean: 응? 페로 언. 니. 왜 그래? 주인님이 주신다는데 설마 싫어?

1000630645.english: No way! Of course I have to try it. It looks delicious, Master.
1000630645.korean: 그럴 리가! 다…당연히 먹어봐야죠. 맛있겠네요. 주인님.

1000630646.english: - I put the big, thick thing into Perrault's mouth.
1000630646.korean: - 나는 크고 걸쭉한 그것을 페로의 입안에 집어넣었다.

1000630647.english: - Perrault munched on the meat pie in his mouth for a moment, then said,
1000630647.korean: - 페로는 잠깐 입안에 미트파이를 우물거리더니 이내,

1000630649.english: - Although he let out a somewhat strange groan, he managed to swallow the meat pie in his mouth.
1000630649.korean: - 다소 괴상한 신음소리를 흘리긴 했지만, 입안의 미트 파이를 삼키는데 성공했다.

1000630650.english: Ha... Hachiko made a really... delicious meat pie.
1000630650.korean: 하... 하치코가 정... 말 맛있는 미트 파이를 만들었군요.

1000630651.english: - I think it was a good idea to feed it to Perrault first.
1000630651.korean: - 역시 먼저 페로에게 먹이길 잘한 것 같다.

1000630652.english: How about a bite of Poi too, Master?

1000630655.english: - At that moment, footsteps were heard in the hallway, and Hachiko ran into the room.
1000630655.korean: - 그때 복도에서 발걸음 소리가 들리더니, 하치코가 방 안으로 달려왔다.

1000630656.english: Master, did you eat the meat pie that Hachiko and Aurora worked so hard to make today? How was it?
1000630656.korean: 주인님 하치코가 오늘 아우로라랑 열심히 만든 미트 파이 드셨나요? 어땠어요?

1000630657.english: Hehe. Really? I prepared a lot to give to you, Master, so don't worry and eat.
1000630657.korean: 헤헤. 정말요? 주인님 드리려고 많이 많이 준비했으니까, 걱정 말고 드세요 주인님.

1000630658.english: Oh? By the way, what were Perrault and Poy doing here?
1000630658.korean: 어라? 그런데, 페로랑 포이랑 여기서 뭐 하고 있었던 거야?

1000630659.english: I was eating dessert with my master.
1000630659.korean: 주... 주인님이랑 같이 디저트를 먹고 있었어.

1000630661.english: Yes, it's good! Since Perrault and Poi are sitting on either side of me...
1000630661.korean: 네, 좋아요! 페로랑 포이가 양옆으로 앉아 있으니까...

1000630662.english: So is this Hachiko's seat? Hehe.

1000630664.english: - Hachiko smiled brightly and squeezed into the empty middle seat between Perrault and Poi.
1000630664.korean: - 하치코는 해맑게 웃으며, 페로와 포이 사이에 비어있는 중간 자리로 끼어 들어왔고

1000630665.english: - I gave a bite of chocolate meat pie to Hachiko, who was rubbing his body from side to side and looking happy.
1000630665.korean: - 나는 양옆으로 몸을 비비며 행복해하는 하치코에게도 초코 미트 파이를 한입 넣어주었다.

1000630666.english: Hmm~! It's delicious as expected! Right, Master?

1000630667.english: - Hachiko was eating the chocolate meat pie with great relish.
1000630667.korean: - 하치코는 초코 미트파이를 정말 맛있게 먹고 있었다.

1000630668.english: Sniff sniff. But I smell Lilith's perfume on you, Master.
1000630668.korean: 킁킁. 그런데 주인님한테서 리리스언니 향수 냄새가 나요.

1000630670.english: Oh, there's a smell coming from this case. I could smell perfume in the master's bed too. It's the same smell, so it must be Lilith's perfume.
1000630670.korean: 아, 여기 케이스에서 냄새가 나요. 주인님 침대에서도 계속 향수 냄새가 났었는데. 같은 냄새니까 리리스언니 향수가 맞을 거예요.

1000630671.english: - The file case Hachiko was pointing to was the payment report that Lilith had brought earlier.
1000630671.korean: - 하치코가 가리킨 파일 케이스는 아까 리리스가 가져다준 결재 보고서였다.

1000630672.english: Yes? Why are you like that, Master?

1000630674.english: Hahaha. That's because when Lilith-Big Sis was not there, she rubbed her whole body on the bed!
1000630674.korean: 하하하. 그건 리리스 언니가 주인님 안 계실 때 침대에 온몸을 마구 비벼서 그래요!

1000630682.english: Sigh... I'm sorry, Master. I'll go and arrest those two first.
1000630682.korean: 하아... 죄송합니다. 주인님. 우선 두 사람을 잡아오겠습니다.

1000630683.english: Yes? Are you really okay, Master?

1000630685.english: - So the three of them ran out of the room.
1000630685.korean: - 그렇게 세 사람은 방에서 후다닥 뛰쳐나갔다.

1000630686.english: - But for some reason, one of my knees was a little wet.
1000630686.korean: - 그런데 어째서인지 내 무릎 한쪽이 조금 축축하게 젖어있었다.

1000630688.english: - The things I've been so worried about are becoming reality. That's why I opposed Poi's restoration...
1000630688.korean: - 내가 그렇게 우려하던 일이 점점 현실이 되어가고 있어. 그래서 포이의 복원을 반대한 건데...

1000630689.english: - No, I, your trusted bodyguard, must protect you from Poi's clutches!
1000630689.korean: - 안돼, 다른 누구도 아닌 주인님의 믿음직한 경호원인 내가 포이의 마수에서 주인님을 지켜야만 해!

1000630691.english: Hello Portia. By the way, are you on your way to see the master?
1000630691.korean: 포티아님 안녕하세요. 그런데 혹시, 주인님한테 가시는 길이신가요?

1000630692.english: Yes, this is fresh milk that just arrived today. I prepared a lot because the owner said he likes the elves' milk.
1000630692.korean: 네, 오늘 새로 나온 신선한 우유에요. 주인님이 엘프분들의 우유를 좋아하신다고 하셔서 많이 준비해왔어요.

1000630694.english: I was just about to go see the owner, so can I bring that to you?
1000630694.korean: 마침 제가 주인님한테 가려던 참이였는데, 그건 제가 가져다드려도 될까요?

1000630696.english: Portia, you must be tired from all the kitchen work, so I thought it would be okay for me to help you with serving.
1000630696.korean: 포티아님도 주방일 때문에 힘드실 텐데 서빙 정도는 제가 해드려도 될 것 같아서 말이에요.

1000630698.english: Yes, then I will ask you to do so.

1000630699.english: Hey, actually, I heard that from Aurora. The master has gotten a bit more aggressive lately, hasn't he? Hehe.
1000630699.korean: 저기, 실은 아우로라양 한테서 들었어요. 주인님이 요즘 들어 더 쌔지시긴 하셨죠? 후훗.

1000630700.english: Yes? Of course, you've gotten stronger than before because you've been eating well and exercising.
1000630700.korean: 네? 물론, 영양도 잘 챙기시고 운동도 하시니 예전보다 강해지시긴 하셨죠.

1000630701.english: Oh, that's not what I meant. Haha...

1000630702.english: Oh, anyway, I'll ask for your help. And if anything good happens, please let me know.
1000630702.korean: 어, 어쨌든 잘 부탁드릴게요. 그리고 혹시 좋은 일이 생기시면 저한테도 말해주시는 거예요.

1000630704.english: ...Okay, then if I just have this…

1000630705.english: I'm definitely not doing this out of jealousy towards Poi. I'm doing this to protect my master!
1000630705.korean: 이건 절대 포이한테 질투해서 이러는 게 아니야. 나는 주인님을 지키기 위해서 이러는 거야!

1000630706.english: An hour until the maids come to clean… That's plenty. This time, for sure…
1000630706.korean: 메이드 분들이 청소를 오기까지 1시간… 충분해. 이번에야말로…

1000630707.english: - After finishing the meeting with the commanders, I headed back to the commander's office.
1000630707.korean: - 지휘관들과의 회의를 마치고 나는 다시 사령관 실로 향했다.

1000630708.english: - But as soon as I opened the door to the commander's office, a pungent milky scent hit my nose, and an unbelievable sight unfolded before me.
1000630708.korean: - 그런데 사령관실 문을 열자마자 비릿한 우유 향이 코를 찔렀다, 그리고 그 앞에 믿기지 않는 풍경이 펼쳐져 있었다.

1000630710.english: I'm sorry, Master... I accidentally... spilled your milk.
1000630710.korean: 죄송해요. 주인님... 제가 실수로... 주인님의 우유를 흘려버리고 말았어요.

1000630711.english: - Perrault winked one eye and licked the milk off his hand.
1000630711.korean: - 페로는 한쪽 눈을 찡긋이며 손에 묻은 우유를 핥았다.

1000630712.english: Ah... Master, what should I do? What punishment should I receive...
1000630712.korean: 아아... 주인님 어떡하면 좋죠? 제가 어떤 벌을 받아야...

1000630716.english: Master~~ I asked Sister Lilith to escort you today too...
1000630716.korean: 주인님~~ 리리스 언니에게 부탁해서 오늘도 포이가 주인님의 호위를...

1000630717.english: Oh my, what is going on?

1000630719.english: Hmm... Master? Poi will call the maids.

1000630721.english: I... I'll clean it up! Master, I was wrong. I can clean it up!
1000630721.korean: 제... 제가 치울게요! 주인님 잘못했어요. 제가 치울 수 있어요!

1000630722.english: Master! I wasn't trying to be a joke. The truth is...
1000630722.korean: 주인님! 실은 장난을 치려는 게 아니었어요. 사실은...

1000630724.english: Haa... I'm glad the elves and the people in the kitchen forgave me...
1000630724.korean: 하아... 엘프님들과 주방에 계신 분들이 용서해 주셔서 다행이야...

1000630725.english: But I can't give up yet. Yes, this time, I'll finally get my master from Poi...
1000630725.korean: 하지만 아직 포기할 수는 없어. 그래, 이번에야말로 포이한테서 주인님을...

1000630727.english: Sister Lilith. Feather? What's going on with you all?
1000630727.korean: 리리스 언니. 페더? 다들 무슨 일이시죠?

1000630728.english: Perrault, are you on your way to see the master now?
1000630728.korean: 페로 혹시 지금 주인님한테 가는 길이니?

1000630730.english: I see, but since the master is currently under Poi's protection, there is no need for you to go to the master right away.
1000630730.korean: 그렇구나, 그렇지만 지금 주인님은 포이가 경호하고 있으니 네가 당장 주인님한테 갈 필요는 없어.

1000630732.english: And Perrault? I heard you spilled your master's milk as a joke. Is that true?
1000630732.korean: 그리고 페로? 주인님의 우유를 장난으로 쏟았다던데, 그게 사실이니?

1000630733.english: Sister Lilith. What happened before was definitely my fault, but honestly...
1000630733.korean: 리리스 언니. 이전 일은 분명 제 잘못이었지만 사실 그건...

1000630735.english: But, Sister Lilith! I can't leave Master and Poi alone.
1000630735.korean: 그렇지만 리리스 언니! 주인님과 포이를 단둘이 둘 수는 없어요.

1000630736.english: You know too, Sister Lilith, right? Why Poi was abandoned... Poi will attack you, Master!
1000630736.korean: 리리스 언니도 아시잖아요? 포이가 왜 폐기되었는지... 포이가 주인님을 덮쳐버릴 거예요!

1000630738.english: The master is stronger than Perrault thinks. I don't think the master will be easily defeated by Poi.
1000630738.korean: 페로가 생각하는 것보다 주인님은 강하시단다. 난 주인님이 포이에게 쉽게 당할 거라고 생각하지 않아.

1000630739.english: Or, Perrault, are you saying you don't trust your master?
1000630739.korean: 그게 아니면 페로, 너는 혹시 주인님을 믿지 못하겠다는 거니?

1000630741.english: Hehehe, when I saw you, it seemed like Perrault was really worried about Poi.
1000630741.korean: 후훗, 언니가 봤을 때 페로가 포이를 신경 쓰느라 마음고생이 심한 것 같은데.

1000630742.english: ...Yeah, a good idea occurred to me. Should we go on a picnic with the companions for the first time in a while?
1000630742.korean: ...그래, 좋은 생각이 났어. 오랜만에 컴패니언끼리 피크닉이라도 갈까?

1000630743.english: Yes, I like it. Sister Perrault? Sister Hachiko said she discovered a new flower garden this time. I'm sure we'll have a great time if we all go together.
1000630743.korean: 네, 저는 좋아요. 페로 언니? 이번에 하치코 언니가 새로운 꽃밭을 발견했다고 하셨는데, 모두 같이 가면 분명 즐거운 시간을 보낼 수 있을 거예요.

1000630745.english: Don't overthink it. The sisters are just going to go together to clear their heads for a bit.
1000630745.korean: 복잡하게 생각할 것 없어. 자매들끼리 잠깐 머리도 식힐 겸 같이 갔다 오는 거야.

1000630752.english: Isn't it against the rules to take out your fingernails? Hehehe.

1000630753.english: It's the first time I've seen you smile like that, Sister Lilith.
1000630753.korean: 페로 언니가 저렇게 웃는 건 처음 봐요, 리리스 언니.

1000630754.english: Yeah, I don't know about Feather yet, but Perrault is the type to smile a lot.
1000630754.korean: 응, 페더는 아직 잘 모르겠지만 페로도 원래 잘 웃는 편이야.

1000630755.english: But since that child always hides that nature, no one would have noticed it easily.
1000630755.korean: 하지만 저 아이는 항상 그런 본성을 숨기고 다니기 때문에, 다들 쉽게 눈치채지는 못했을 거야.

1000630756.english: Well, it's been a while since I've seen Perrault smile like that.
1000630756.korean: 뭐, 나도 페로가 저렇게 웃는 걸 보는 건 오랜만 이긴 해.

1000630757.english: Hehehe, even though it's said that Sister Perrault has cat genes in her, it seems that 'nepetalactone' actually works.
1000630757.korean: 후훗, 페로 언니한테 고양이의 유전자가 들어있다고는 하지만 '네페탈락톤'이 실제로 효과가 있는 모양이네요.

1000630758.english: No, it's not just for that reason, Feather.
1000630758.korean: 아니. 꼭 그런 이유 때문만은 아니야 페더.

1000630760.english: Of course, I do have some cat genes in me, but it's not enough to affect me that much.
1000630760.korean: 물론 내 안에 고양이의 유전자가 조금 포함되어 있긴 하지만 그런 게 내게 큰 영향을 끼칠 정도는 아니야.

1000630762.english: I'm just happy that my sisters and I came together for a picnic.
1000630762.korean: 난 그저 우리 자매들끼리 피크닉을 같이 온 게 즐거울 뿐이야.

1000630764.english: Perrault! Hachiko and Feather made a flower crown for you. Try it on!
1000630764.korean: 페로! 하치코랑 페더가 페로를 위해 꽃 왕관을 만들어 봤어. 한번 써봐!

1000630765.english: Thanks, Hachiko. Feather, but I'm not going to wear this crown. This is made of catnip, right?
1000630765.korean: 고마워. 하치코, 페더 그렇지만 이 왕관은 안 쓸 거야. 이거 '개박하'로 만든 거지?

1000630767.english: Seriously... I'm telling you, that kind of thing doesn't work on me...
1000630767.korean: 정말... 그런 거 나한테는 통하지 않는다니까...

1000630768.english: Hachiko, Pero! It's time to go back.

1000630772.english: ...I feel a little... disappointed... so shall we all come on a picnic together again next time?
1000630772.korean: ...조금... 아쉬운 기분이 들어서... 다음에도 다 같이 피크닉 올까?

1000630773.english: Yeah! Poi wasn't here today, so let's bring him next time!
1000630773.korean: 응! 오늘은 포이가 없었으니까 다음번엔 포이도 데리고 오자!

1000630775.english: Yeah. Let's make sure to do that.

1000630776.english: Thanks to going on a picnic with my sisters, I was able to clear my head a bit... I think I've been acting too sensitive lately.
1000630776.korean: - 자매들과 함께 피크닉을 갔다 온 덕분에 머리를 좀 식힐 수 있었어... 내가 요즘 너무 예민하게 굴었던 것 같아.

1000630777.english: I've been so harsh on Poi all this time... but those are just records of the past...
1000630777.korean: - 난 지금껏 포이한테 너무 까칠하게 대했었지… 그건 그저 과거의 기록들일 뿐인데….

1000630778.english: Now, I'm going to take Poi under my control with charisma, just like Lilith.
1000630778.korean: - 이젠 나도 리리스 언니처럼 포이를 카리스마로 휘어잡는 거야.

1000630781.english: I'm back, Master. Did Poi cause any trouble during this time?
1000630781.korean: 다녀왔습니다. 주인님. 그동안 포이가 별 말썽은 안 피웠나요?

1000630783.english: … Did you return safely, Hachiko-nee, Pero-nee.
1000630783.korean: … 평안히 다녀오셨나요, 하치코 언니, 페로 언니.

1000630784.english: Yeah, I'm back… Huh? What did Poi just say…?
1000630784.korean: 응, 갔다왔… 어? 포이 지금 뭐라고….

1000630785.english: Ah, I can smell Lilith's perfume on Poi too.
1000630785.korean: 아, 포이한테서도 리리스 언니 향수 냄새가 나네.

1000630786.english: That's strange. Lilith went on a picnic with us...
1000630786.korean: 이상하다. 리리스 언니는 우리랑 같이 피크닉 떠났는데….

1000630789.english: Haa haa... It's nothing. This room was just filled with the scent of Lilith's perfume. Right. I guess that's why it clung to me a little.
1000630789.korean: 하아하앗… 아무 일도 아니에요. 그저 이 방에 리리스언니의 향수 냄새가 가득 차 있었을 뿐이에요. 그래요. 그래서 제 몸에 조금 베었나 봐요.

1000630790.english: And, I'm really sorry about what happened last time, Ferro...
1000630790.korean: 그리고, 지난번 일들은  제가 정말 죄송해요, 페로 언니….

1000630791.english: From now on, Poi will become a loyal bodyguard for the Master, who listens well to the older sisters.
1000630791.korean: 이제 포이는 언니들 말씀도 잘 듣는 주인님의 충직한 경호원이 될게요.

1000630793.english: Perrault was wide-eyed at Poi's changed attitude.
1000630793.korean: - 페로는 달라진 포이의 태도에 눈이 휘둥그레져 있었다.

1000630794.english: Um... did something happen to Poi, Master?
1000630794.korean: 저... 저기 포이에게 무슨 일이 있었나요, 주인님?

1000630795.english: Hehe... I wonder if Master's sincere wish for the sisters to get along was conveyed to Poi?
1000630795.korean: 후후… 자매들끼리 사이좋게 지내길 바라시는, 주인님의 진심이 포이에게 전해진 게 아닐까?

1000630796.english: I told you not to worry too much.
1000630796.korean: 그러게 이 언니가 너무 걱정할 건 없다고 했잖아.

1000630797.english: Well then, it's time for Ferro to take over the security duties, so you'll have to switch places with Foi, Ferro.
1000630797.korean: 그럼 이제 페로가 경호할 시간이니 포이와 교대해야겠네, 페로.

1000630798.english: Go and catch up on all the conversations you couldn't have with your master during this time, Pero.
1000630798.korean: 그동안에 주인님과 못했던 대화들도 풀고 오렴, 페로.
